revision.text:
'''乙巳'''（きのとみ、いつし）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
[[甲子]]から数えて42番目で、前は[[甲辰]]、次は[[丙午]]である。[[十干]]の[[五行思想|五行]]は木、[[十二支]]の五行は火で、[[五行思想#相生|相生]]（木生火）である。
==乙巳の年==
==乙巳の日== ===[[選日]]=== 乙巳の日は[[天一天上]]の13日目である。

revision.text:
{{干支}} '''乙巳'''（きのとみ、おつぼくのみ、いっし）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
干支の組み合わせの42番目で、前は[[甲辰]]、次は[[丙午]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[乙]]は陰の[[木]]、[[十二支]]の[[巳]]は陰の[[火]]で、[[五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|相生]]（木生火）である。
==乙巳の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って45が余る年が乙巳の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''乙巳の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[45年]] *[[105年]] *[[165年]] *[[225年]] *[[285年]] *[[345年]] *[[405年]] *[[465年]] *[[525年]] *[[585年]] *[[645年]] *[[705年]] *[[765年]] *[[825年]] *[[885年]] *[[945年]] | *[[1005年]] *[[1065年]] *[[1125年]] *[[1185年]] *[[1245年]] *[[1305年]] *[[1365年]] *[[1425年]] *[[1485年]] *[[1545年]] *[[1605年]] *[[1665年]] *[[1725年]] *[[1785年]] *[[1845年]] *[[1905年]] *[[1965年]] | *[[2025年]] *[[2085年]] *[[2145年]] *[[2205年]] *[[2265年]] *[[2325年]] *[[2385年]] *[[2445年]] *[[2505年]] *[[2565年]] *[[2625年]] *[[2685年]] *[[2745年]] *[[2805年]] *[[2865年]] *[[2925年]] *[[2985年]] |} ===出来事=== *[[645年]]の中大兄皇子、中臣鎌足らによる蘇我氏族滅を[[乙巳の変]]という。 *[[1905年]]に締結された[[第二次日韓協約]]を韓国側では'''乙巳'''保護条約という。
==乙巳の月== 西暦年の下1桁が2・7（十干が[[壬]]・[[丁]]）の年の[[4月]]が乙巳の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[立夏]]から[[芒種]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==乙巳の日== ===選日=== 乙巳の日は[[天一天上]]の13日目である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:New pages]] [[Category:pages needing attribution]][[Category:乙巳]][[Category:pages needing attribution]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:乙巳]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[ja:乙巳]]

==乙巳の月== 西暦年の下1桁が2・7（十干が[[壬]]・[[丁]]）の年の[[4月]]が乙巳の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[立夏]]から[[芒種]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==乙巳の日== ===選日=== 乙巳の日は[[天一天上]]の13日目である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:New pages]] [[Category:乙巳]][[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:乙巳]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[ja:乙巳]]

==乙巳の月== 西暦年の下1桁が2・7（十干が[[壬]]・[[丁]]）の年の[[4月]]が乙巳の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[立夏]]から[[芒種]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。

干支の組み合わせの42番目で、前は[[甲辰]]、次は[[丙午]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[乙]]は陰の[[木]]、[[十二支]]の[[巳]]は陰の[[火]]で、[[五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|相生]]（木生火）である。
==乙巳の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って45が余る年が乙巳の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''乙巳の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[45年]] *[[105年]] *[[165年]] *[[225年]] *[[285年]] *[[345年]] *[[405年]] *[[465年]] *[[525年]] *[[585年]] *[[645年]] *[[705年]] *[[765年]] *[[825年]] *[[885年]] *[[945年]] | *[[1005年]] *[[1065年]] *[[1125年]] *[[1185年]] *[[1245年]] *[[1305年]] *[[1365年]] *[[1425年]] *[[1485年]] *[[1545年]] *[[1605年]] *[[1665年]] *[[1725年]] *[[1785年]] *[[1845年]] *[[1905年]] *[[1965年]] | *[[2025年]] *[[2085年]] *[[2145年]] *[[2205年]] *[[2265年]] *[[2325年]] *[[2385年]] *[[2445年]] *[[2505年]] *[[2565年]] *[[2625年]] *[[2685年]] *[[2745年]] *[[2805年]] *[[2865年]] *[[2925年]] *[[2985年]] |} ===出来事=== *[[645年]]の中大兄皇子、中臣鎌足らによる蘇我氏族滅を[[乙巳の変]]という。 *[[1905年]]に締結された[[第二次日韓協約]]を韓国側では'''乙巳'''保護条約という。
==乙巳の月== 西暦年の下1桁が2・7（十干が[[壬]]・[[丁]]）の年の[[4月]]が乙巳の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[立夏]]から[[芒種]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==乙巳の日== ===選日=== 乙巳の日は[[天一天上]]の13日目である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:QQ]][[ja:乙巳]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:乙巳]][[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:乙巳]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:new pages]] [[ja:乙巳]]

{{干支}} '''乙巳'''（きのとみ、おつぼくのみ、いっし）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
干支の組み合わせの42番目で、前は[[甲辰]]、次は[[丙午]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[乙]]は陰の[[木]]、[[十二支]]の[[巳]]は陰の[[火]]で、[[五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|相生]]（木生火）である。
==乙巳の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って45が余る年が乙巳の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''乙巳の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[45年]] *[[105年]] *[[165年]] *[[225年]] *[[285年]] *[[345年]] *[[405年]] *[[465年]] *[[525年]] *[[585年]] *[[645年]] *[[705年]] *[[765年]] *[[825年]] *[[885年]] *[[945年]] | *[[1005年]] *[[1065年]] *[[1125年]] *[[1185年]] *[[1245年]] *[[1305年]] *[[1365年]] *[[1425年]] *[[1485年]] *[[1545年]] *[[1605年]] *[[1665年]] *[[1725年]] *[[1785年]] *[[1845年]] *[[1905年]] *[[1965年]] | *[[2025年]] *[[2085年]] *[[2145年]] *[[2205年]] *[[2265年]] *[[2325年]] *[[2385年]] *[[2445年]] *[[2505年]] *[[2565年]] *[[2625年]] *[[2685年]] *[[2745年]] *[[2805年]] *[[2865年]] *[[2925年]] *[[2985年]] |} ===出来事=== *[[645年]]の中大兄皇子、中臣鎌足らによる蘇我氏族滅を[[乙巳の変]]という。 *[[1905年]]に締結された[[第二次日韓協約]]を韓国側では'''乙巳'''保護条約という。
==乙巳の月== 西暦年の下1桁が2・7（十干が[[壬]]・[[丁]]）の年の[[4月]]が乙巳の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[立夏]]から[[芒種]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==乙巳の日== ===選日=== 乙巳の日は[[天一天上]]の13日目である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Wood Snake-qq]] [[Category:QQ]][[ja:乙巳]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:乙巳]][[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:乙巳]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Wood Snake-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:Subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yin Wood Snake}][[Category:qq]] [[ja:乙巳]]

{{干支}} '''乙巳'''（きのとみ、おつぼくのみ、いっし）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
干支の組み合わせの42番目で、前は[[甲辰]]、次は[[丙午]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[乙]]は陰の[[木]]、[[十二支]]の[[巳]]は陰の[[火]]で、[[五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|相生]]（木生火）である。
==乙巳の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って45が余る年が乙巳の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''乙巳の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[45年]] *[[105年]] *[[165年]] *[[225年]] *[[285年]] *[[345年]] *[[405年]] *[[465年]] *[[525年]] *[[585年]] *[[645年]] *[[705年]] *[[765年]] *[[825年]] *[[885年]] *[[945年]] | *[[1005年]] *[[1065年]] *[[1125年]] *[[1185年]] *[[1245年]] *[[1305年]] *[[1365年]] *[[1425年]] *[[1485年]] *[[1545年]] *[[1605年]] *[[1665年]] *[[1725年]] *[[1785年]] *[[1845年]] *[[1905年]] *[[1965年]] | *[[2025年]] *[[2085年]] *[[2145年]] *[[2205年]] *[[2265年]] *[[2325年]] *[[2385年]] *[[2445年]] *[[2505年]] *[[2565年]] *[[2625年]] *[[2685年]] *[[2745年]] *[[2805年]] *[[2865年]] *[[2925年]] *[[2985年]] |} ===出来事=== *[[645年]]の中大兄皇子、中臣鎌足らによる蘇我氏族滅を[[乙巳の変]]という。 *[[1905年]]に締結された[[第二次日韓協約]]を韓国側では'''乙巳'''保護条約という。
==乙巳の月== 西暦年の下1桁が2・7（十干が[[壬]]・[[丁]]）の年の[[4月]]が乙巳の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[立夏]]から[[芒種]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==乙巳の日== ===選日=== 乙巳の日は[[天一天上]]の13日目である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Wood Snake-qq]] [[Category:QQ]][[ja:乙巳]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:乙巳]][[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:乙巳]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Wood Snake-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:Subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yin Wood Snake}][[Category:qq]] [[Category:subst:MAINSPACE]] [[ja:乙巳]]

{{干支}} '''乙巳'''（きのとみ、おつぼくのみ、いっし）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
干支の組み合わせの42番目で、前は[[甲辰]]、次は[[丙午]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[乙]]は陰の[[木]]、[[十二支]]の[[巳]]は陰の[[火]]で、[[五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|相生]]（木生火）である。
==乙巳の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って45が余る年が乙巳の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''乙巳の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[45年]] *[[105年]] *[[165年]] *[[225年]] *[[285年]] *[[345年]] *[[405年]] *[[465年]] *[[525年]] *[[585年]] *[[645年]] *[[705年]] *[[765年]] *[[825年]] *[[885年]] *[[945年]] | *[[1005年]] *[[1065年]] *[[1125年]] *[[1185年]] *[[1245年]] *[[1305年]] *[[1365年]] *[[1425年]] *[[1485年]] *[[1545年]] *[[1605年]] *[[1665年]] *[[1725年]] *[[1785年]] *[[1845年]] *[[1905年]] *[[1965年]] | *[[2025年]] *[[2085年]] *[[2145年]] *[[2205年]] *[[2265年]] *[[2325年]] *[[2385年]] *[[2445年]] *[[2505年]] *[[2565年]] *[[2625年]] *[[2685年]] *[[2745年]] *[[2805年]] *[[2865年]] *[[2925年]] *[[2985年]] |} ===出来事=== *[[645年]]の中大兄皇子、中臣鎌足らによる蘇我氏族滅を[[乙巳の変]]という。 *[[1905年]]に締結された[[第二次日韓協約]]を韓国側では'''乙巳'''保護条約という。
==乙巳の月== 西暦年の下1桁が2・7（十干が[[壬]]・[[丁]]）の年の[[4月]]が乙巳の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[立夏]]から[[芒種]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==乙巳の日== ===選日=== 乙巳の日は[[天一天上]]の13日目である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Wood Snake-qq]] [[Category:QQ]][[ja:乙巳]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:乙巳]][[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:乙巳]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Wood Snake-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:Subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yin Wood Snake}][[Category:qq]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[ja:乙巳]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Wood Snake]][[Category:qq]]

{{干支}} '''Yin Wood Snake''' (乙巳, Kinoto-Mi, Otsuboku-no-Mi, Isshi) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|干支}}.
It is the 42nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|干支}}, preceded by {{ill|Jiachen|ja|甲辰}} and followed by {{ill|Bingwu|ja|丙午}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} character {{ill|Yi|ja|乙}} represents yin {{ill|Wood (wuxing)|ja|木}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}} character {{ill|Si|ja|巳}} represents yin {{ill|Fire (wuxing)|ja|火}}, forming a generating ({{ill|Mutual Generation|ja|相生}}) relationship (Wood generates Fire).
== Yin Wood Snake Years == Years where the remainder when divided by 60 is 45 are Yin Wood Snake years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Snake Years''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[45]] *[[105]] *[[165]] *[[225]] *[[285]] *[[345]] *[[405]] *[[465]] *[[525]] *[[585]] *[[645]] *[[705]] *[[765]] *[[825]] *[[885]] *[[945]] | *[[1005]] *[[1065]] *[[1125]] *[[1185]] *[[1245]] *[[1305]] *[[1365]] *[[1425]] *[[1485]] *[[1545]] *[[1605]] *[[1665]] *[[1725]] *[[1785]] *[[1845]] *[[1905]] *[[1965]] | *[[2025]] *[[2085]] *[[2145]] *[[2205]] *[[2265]] *[[2325]] *[[2385]] *[[2445]] *[[2505]] *[[2565]] *[[2625]] *[[2685]] *[[2745]] *[[2805]] *[[2865]] *[[2925]] *[[2985]] |}
=== Events === * The downfall of the Soga clan by {{ill|Prince Naka no Ōe|ja|中大兄皇子}} and {{ill|Nakatomi no Kamatari|ja|中臣鎌足}} in [[645]] is known as the {{ill|Isshi Incident|ja|乙巳の変}}. * The {{ill|Eulsa Treaty|ja|第二次日韓協約}} signed in [[1905]] is referred to as the '''Eulsa''' Protection Treaty in Korea.
== Yin Wood Snake Months == April of years ending in 2 or 7 (where the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁}}) corresponds to the Yin Wood Snake {{ill|Month|ja|月}}. However, in the case of traditional calendars, the Yin Wood Snake month may be applied based on the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Lixia|ja|立夏}} to the day before {{ill|Mangzhong|ja|芒種}}).
== Yin Wood Snake Days ==
=== Special Calendar Notations === * Yin Wood Snake day is the 13th day of the {{ill|Tianyi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上}} cycle.
== Related Topics == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|干支}} * {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} * {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:Yin Wood Snake]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:QQ]] [[ja:乙巳]]

{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Wood Snake''' (乙巳, Kinoto-Mi, Otsuboku-no-Mi, Isshi) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}.
It is the 42nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}, preceded by {{ill|Jiachen|ja|甲辰}} and followed by {{ill|Bingwu|ja|丙午}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} character {{ill|Yi|ja|乙}} represents yin {{ill|Wood (wuxing)|ja|木}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}} character {{ill|Si|ja|巳}} represents yin {{ill|Fire (wuxing)|ja|火}}, forming a generating ({{ill|Mutual Generation|ja|相生}}) relationship (Wood generates Fire).
== Yin Wood Snake Years == Years where the remainder when divided by 60 is 45 are Yin Wood Snake years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Snake Years''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[45]] *[[105]] *[[165]] *[[225]] *[[285]] *[[345]] *[[405]] *[[465]] *[[525]] *[[585]] *[[645]] *[[705]] *[[765]] *[[825]] *[[885]] *[[945]] | *[[1005]] *[[1065]] *[[1125]] *[[1185]] *[[1245]] *[[1305]] *[[1365]] *[[1425]] *[[1485]] *[[1545]] *[[1605]] *[[1665]] *[[1725]] *[[1785]] *[[1845]] *[[1905]] *[[1965]] | *[[2025]] *[[2085]] *[[2145]] *[[2205]] *[[2265]] *[[2325]] *[[2385]] *[[2445]] *[[2505]] *[[2565]] *[[2625]] *[[2685]] *[[2745]] *[[2805]] *[[2865]] *[[2925]] *[[2985]] |}
=== Events === * The downfall of the Soga clan by {{ill|Prince Naka no Ōe|ja|中大兄皇子}} and {{ill|Nakatomi no Kamatari|ja|中臣鎌足}} in [[645]] is known as the {{ill|Isshi Incident|ja|乙巳の変}}. * The {{ill|Eulsa Treaty|ja|第二次日韓協約}} signed in [[1905]] is referred to as the '''Eulsa''' Protection Treaty in Korea.
== Yin Wood Snake Months == April of years ending in 2 or 7 (where the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁}}) corresponds to the Yin Wood Snake {{ill|Month|ja|月}}. However, in the case of traditional calendars, the Yin Wood Snake month may be applied based on the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Lixia|ja|立夏}} to the day before {{ill|Mangzhong|ja|芒種}}).
== Yin Wood Snake Days ==
=== Special Calendar Notations === * Yin Wood Snake day is the 13th day of the {{ill|Tianyi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上}} cycle.
== Related Topics == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} * {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} * {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}}

=== Special Calendar Notations === * Yin Wood Snake day is the 13th day of the {{ill|Tianyi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上}} cycle.
== Related Topics == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} * {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} * {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}}

{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Wood Snake''' (乙巳, Kinoto-Mi, Otsuboku-no-Mi, Isshi) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}.
It is the 42nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}, preceded by {{ill|Jiachen|ja|甲辰}} and followed by {{ill|Bingwu|ja|丙午}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} character {{ill|Yi|ja|乙}} represents yin {{ill|Wood (wuxing)|ja|木}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}} character {{ill|Si|ja|巳}} represents yin {{ill|Fire (wuxing)|ja|火}}, forming a generating ({{ill|Mutual Generation|ja|相生}}) relationship (Wood generates Fire).
== Yin Wood Snake Years == Years where the remainder when divided by 60 is 45 are Yin Wood Snake years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Snake Years''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[45]] *[[105]] *[[165]] *[[225]] *[[285]] *[[345]] *[[405]] *[[465]] *[[525]] *[[585]] *[[645]] *[[705]] *[[765]] *[[825]] *[[885]] *[[945]] | *[[1005]] *[[1065]] *[[1125]] *[[1185]] *[[1245]] *[[1305]] *[[1365]] *[[1425]] *[[1485]] *[[1545]] *[[1605]] *[[1665]] *[[1725]] *[[1785]] *[[1845]] *[[1905]] *[[1965]] | *[[2025]] *[[2085]] *[[2145]] *[[2205]] *[[2265]] *[[2325]] *[[2385]] *[[2445]] *[[2505]] *[[2565]] *[[2625]] *[[2685]] *[[2745]] *[[2805]] *[[2865]] *[[2925]] *[[2985]] |}

However, in the case of traditional calendars, the Yin Wood Snake month may be applied based on the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Lixia|ja|立夏}} to the day before {{ill|Mangzhong|ja|芒種}}).
== Yin Wood Snake Days ==
=== Special Calendar Notations === * Yin Wood Snake day is the 13th day of the {{ill|Tianyi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上}} cycle.

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}↵'''" to "{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''{{subst:PAGENAME}} also known as "
revision.text:
{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Wood Snake also known as Yin Wood Snake''' (乙巳, Kinoto-Mi, Otsuboku-no-Mi, Isshi) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}.
It is the 42nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}, preceded by {{ill|Jiachen|ja|甲辰}} and followed by {{ill|Bingwu|ja|丙午}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} character {{ill|Yi|ja|乙}} represents yin {{ill|Wood (wuxing)|ja|木}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}} character {{ill|Si|ja|巳}} represents yin {{ill|Fire (wuxing)|ja|火}}, forming a generating ({{ill|Mutual Generation|ja|相生}}) relationship (Wood generates Fire).
== Yin Wood Snake Years == Years where the remainder when divided by 60 is 45 are Yin Wood Snake years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Snake Years''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[45]] *[[105]] *[[165]] *[[225]] *[[285]] *[[345]] *[[405]] *[[465]] *[[525]] *[[585]] *[[645]] *[[705]] *[[765]] *[[825]] *[[885]] *[[945]] | *[[1005]] *[[1065]] *[[1125]] *[[1185]] *[[1245]] *[[1305]] *[[1365]] *[[1425]] *[[1485]] *[[1545]] *[[1605]] *[[1665]] *[[1725]] *[[1785]] *[[1845]] *[[1905]] *[[1965]] | *[[2025]] *[[2085]] *[[2145]] *[[2205]] *[[2265]] *[[2325]] *[[2385]] *[[2445]] *[[2505]] *[[2565]] *[[2625]] *[[2685]] *[[2745]] *[[2805]] *[[2865]] *[[2925]] *[[2985]] |}
=== Events === * The downfall of the Soga clan by {{ill|Prince Naka no Ōe|ja|中大兄皇子}} and {{ill|Nakatomi no Kamatari|ja|中臣鎌足}} in [[645]] is known as the {{ill|Isshi Incident|ja|乙巳の変}}. * The {{ill|Eulsa Treaty|ja|第二次日韓協約}} signed in [[1905]] is referred to as the '''Eulsa''' Protection Treaty in Korea.
== Yin Wood Snake Months == April of years ending in 2 or 7 (where the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁}}) corresponds to the Yin Wood Snake {{ill|Month|ja|月}}. However, in the case of traditional calendars, the Yin Wood Snake month may be applied based on the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Lixia|ja|立夏}} to the day before {{ill|Mangzhong|ja|芒種}}).
== Yin Wood Snake Days ==
=== Special Calendar Notations === * Yin Wood Snake day is the 13th day of the {{ill|Tianyi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上}} cycle.
== See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} * {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} * {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}}

revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Snake|kanji=乙巳|romaji=kinoto mi|onyomi=otsushi|p=yǐsì|w=i-ssu|mi=i²¹ sɨ|y=jyut6 si6|j=jyut6 si6|ci=jyt̚ siː|mc=ʔit si|oc-bs=Ɂik si}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Wood Snake also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Yin Wood Snake''' (乙巳, Kinoto-Mi, Otsuboku-no-Mi, Isshi) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}.
It is the 42nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}, preceded by {{ill|Jiachen|ja|甲辰}} and followed by {{ill|Bingwu|ja|丙午}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} character {{ill|Yi|ja|乙}} represents yin {{ill|Wood (wuxing)|ja|木}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}} character {{ill|Si|ja|巳}} represents yin {{ill|Fire (wuxing)|ja|火}}, forming a generating ({{ill|Mutual Generation|ja|相生}}) relationship (Wood generates Fire).
== Yin Wood Snake Years == Years where the remainder when divided by 60 is 45 are Yin Wood Snake years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Snake Years''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[45]] *[[105]] *[[165]] *[[225]] *[[285]] *[[345]] *[[405]] *[[465]] *[[525]] *[[585]] *[[645]] *[[705]] *[[765]] *[[825]] *[[885]] *[[945]] | *[[1005]] *[[1065]] *[[1125]] *[[1185]] *[[1245]] *[[1305]] *[[1365]] *[[1425]] *[[1485]] *[[1545]] *[[1605]] *[[1665]] *[[1725]] *[[1785]] *[[1845]] *[[1905]] *[[1965]] | *[[2025]] *[[2085]] *[[2145]] *[[2205]] *[[2265]] *[[2325]] *[[2385]] *[[2445]] *[[2505]] *[[2565]] *[[2625]] *[[2685]] *[[2745]] *[[2805]] *[[2865]] *[[2925]] *[[2985]] |}
=== Events === * The downfall of the Soga clan by {{ill|Prince Naka no Ōe|ja|中大兄皇子}} and {{ill|Nakatomi no Kamatari|ja|中臣鎌足}} in [[645]] is known as the {{ill|Isshi Incident|ja|乙巳の変}}. * The {{ill|Eulsa Treaty|ja|第二次日韓協約}} signed in [[1905]] is referred to as the '''Eulsa''' Protection Treaty in Korea.
== Yin Wood Snake Months == April of years ending in 2 or 7 (where the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁}}) corresponds to the Yin Wood Snake {{ill|Month|ja|月}}. However, in the case of traditional calendars, the Yin Wood Snake month may be applied based on the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Lixia|ja|立夏}} to the day before {{ill|Mangzhong|ja|芒種}}).
== Yin Wood Snake Days ==
=== Special Calendar Notations === * Yin Wood Snake day is the 13th day of the {{ill|Tianyi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上}} cycle.
== See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} * {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} * {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Yin Wood Snake]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:QQ]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[ja:乙巳]][[zh:乙巳]][[ko:을사]][[fr:Serpent de bois]][[de:Holz-Schlange]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:乙巳]][[zh:乙巳]][[ko:을사]][[fr:Serpent de bois]][[de:Holz-Schlange]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:乙巳]][[zh:乙巳]][[ko:을사]][[fr:Serpent de bois]][[de:Holz-Schlange]][[Category:qq]][[ja:乙巳]][[zh:乙巳]][[ko:을사]][[fr:Serpent de bois]][[de:Holz-Schlange]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:乙巳]][[zh:乙巳]][[ko:을사]][[fr:Serpent de bois]][[de:Holz-Schlange]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Wood Snake]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:乙巳]] [[ja:乙巳]][[zh:乙巳]][[ko:을사]][[fr:Serpent de bois]][[de:Holz-Schlange]]

revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Snake|kanji=乙巳|romaji=kinoto mi|onyomi=otsushi|p=yǐsì|w=i-ssu|mi=i²¹ sɨ|y=jyut6 si6|j=jyut6 si6|ci=jyt̚ siː|mc=ʔit si|oc-bs=Ɂik si}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Wood Snake also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Yin Wood Snake''' (乙巳, Kinoto-Mi, Otsuboku-no-Mi, Isshi) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}.
It is the 42nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}, preceded by {{ill|Jiachen|ja|甲辰}} and followed by {{ill|Bingwu|ja|丙午}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} character {{ill|Yi|ja|乙}} represents yin {{ill|Wood (wuxing)|ja|木}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}} character {{ill|Si|ja|巳}} represents yin {{ill|Fire (wuxing)|ja|火}}, forming a generating ({{ill|Mutual Generation|ja|相生}}) relationship (Wood generates Fire).
== Yin Wood Snake Years == Years where the remainder when divided by 60 is 45 are Yin Wood Snake years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Snake Years''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[45]] *[[105]] *[[165]] *[[225]] *[[285]] *[[345]] *[[405]] *[[465]] *[[525]] *[[585]] *[[645]] *[[705]] *[[765]] *[[825]] *[[885]] *[[945]] | *[[1005]] *[[1065]] *[[1125]] *[[1185]] *[[1245]] *[[1305]] *[[1365]] *[[1425]] *[[1485]] *[[1545]] *[[1605]] *[[1665]] *[[1725]] *[[1785]] *[[1845]] *[[1905]] *[[1965]] | *[[2025]] *[[2085]] *[[2145]] *[[2205]] *[[2265]] *[[2325]] *[[2385]] *[[2445]] *[[2505]] *[[2565]] *[[2625]] *[[2685]] *[[2745]] *[[2805]] *[[2865]] *[[2925]] *[[2985]] |}
=== Events === * The downfall of the Soga clan by {{ill|Prince Naka no Ōe|ja|中大兄皇子}} and {{ill|Nakatomi no Kamatari|ja|中臣鎌足}} in [[645]] is known as the {{ill|Isshi Incident|ja|乙巳の変}}. * The {{ill|Eulsa Treaty|ja|第二次日韓協約}} signed in [[1905]] is referred to as the '''Eulsa''' Protection Treaty in Korea.
== Yin Wood Snake Months == April of years ending in 2 or 7 (where the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁}}) corresponds to the Yin Wood Snake {{ill|Month|ja|月}}. However, in the case of traditional calendars, the Yin Wood Snake month may be applied based on the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Lixia|ja|立夏}} to the day before {{ill|Mangzhong|ja|芒種}}).
== Yin Wood Snake Days ==
=== Special Calendar Notations === * Yin Wood Snake day is the 13th day of the {{ill|Tianyi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上}} cycle.
== See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} * {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} * {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}}

{| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Snake Years''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[45]] *[[105]] *[[165]] *[[225]] *[[285]] *[[345]] *[[405]] *[[465]] *[[525]] *[[585]] *[[645]] *[[705]] *[[765]] *[[825]] *[[885]] *[[945]] | *[[1005]] *[[1065]] *[[1125]] *[[1185]] *[[1245]] *[[1305]] *[[1365]] *[[1425]] *[[1485]] *[[1545]] *[[1605]] *[[1665]] *[[1725]] *[[1785]] *[[1845]] *[[1905]] *[[1965]] | *[[2025]] *[[2085]] *[[2145]] *[[2205]] *[[2265]] *[[2325]] *[[2385]] *[[2445]] *[[2505]] *[[2565]] *[[2625]] *[[2685]] *[[2745]] *[[2805]] *[[2865]] *[[2925]] *[[2985]] |}
=== Events === * The downfall of the Soga clan by {{ill|Prince Naka no Ōe|ja|中大兄皇子}} and {{ill|Nakatomi no Kamatari|ja|中臣鎌足}} in [[645]] is known as the {{ill|Isshi Incident|ja|乙巳の変}}. * The {{ill|Eulsa Treaty|ja|第二次日韓協約}} signed in [[1905]] is referred to as the '''Eulsa''' Protection Treaty in Korea.
== Yin Wood Snake Months == April of years ending in 2 or 7 (where the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁}}) corresponds to the Yin Wood Snake {{ill|Month|ja|月}}. However, in the case of traditional calendars, the Yin Wood Snake month may be applied based on the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Lixia|ja|立夏}} to the day before {{ill|Mangzhong|ja|芒種}}).
== Yin Wood Snake Days ==
=== Special Calendar Notations === * Yin Wood Snake day is the 13th day of the {{ill|Tianyi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上}} cycle.
== See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} * {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} * {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "|丁}}" to "|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)}}"
revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Snake|kanji=乙巳|romaji=kinoto mi|onyomi=otsushi|p=yǐsì|w=i-ssu|mi=i²¹ sɨ|y=jyut6 si6|j=jyut6 si6|ci=jyt̚ siː|mc=ʔit si|oc-bs=Ɂik si}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Wood Snake also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Yin Wood Snake''' (乙巳, Kinoto-Mi, Otsuboku-no-Mi, Isshi) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}.
It is the 42nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}, preceded by {{ill|Jiachen|ja|甲辰}} and followed by {{ill|Bingwu|ja|丙午}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} character {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)}} represents yin {{ill|Wood (wuxing)|ja|木}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}} character {{ill|Si|ja|巳}} represents yin {{ill|Fire (wuxing)|ja|火}}, forming a generating ({{ill|Mutual Generation|ja|相生}}) relationship (Wood generates Fire).
== Yin Wood Snake Years == Years where the remainder when divided by 60 is 45 are Yin Wood Snake years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Snake Years''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[45]] *[[105]] *[[165]] *[[225]] *[[285]] *[[345]] *[[405]] *[[465]] *[[525]] *[[585]] *[[645]] *[[705]] *[[765]] *[[825]] *[[885]] *[[945]] | *[[1005]] *[[1065]] *[[1125]] *[[1185]] *[[1245]] *[[1305]] *[[1365]] *[[1425]] *[[1485]] *[[1545]] *[[1605]] *[[1665]] *[[1725]] *[[1785]] *[[1845]] *[[1905]] *[[1965]] | *[[2025]] *[[2085]] *[[2145]] *[[2205]] *[[2265]] *[[2325]] *[[2385]] *[[2445]] *[[2505]] *[[2565]] *[[2625]] *[[2685]] *[[2745]] *[[2805]] *[[2865]] *[[2925]] *[[2985]] |}
=== Events === * The downfall of the Soga clan by {{ill|Prince Naka no Ōe|ja|中大兄皇子}} and {{ill|Nakatomi no Kamatari|ja|中臣鎌足}} in [[645]] is known as the {{ill|Isshi Incident|ja|乙巳の変}}. * The {{ill|Eulsa Treaty|ja|第二次日韓協約}} signed in [[1905]] is referred to as the '''Eulsa''' Protection Treaty in Korea.
== Yin Wood Snake Months == April of years ending in 2 or 7 (where the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)}}) corresponds to the Yin Wood Snake {{ill|Month|ja|月}}. However, in the case of traditional calendars, the Yin Wood Snake month may be applied based on the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Lixia|ja|立夏}} to the day before {{ill|Mangzhong|ja|芒種}}).
== Yin Wood Snake Days ==
=== Special Calendar Notations === * Yin Wood Snake day is the 13th day of the {{ill|Tianyi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上}} cycle.
== See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} * {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} * {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}}

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Snake|kanji=乙巳|romaji=kinoto mi|onyomi=otsushi|p=yǐsì|w=i-ssu|mi=i²¹ sɨ|y=jyut6 si6|j=jyut6 si6|ci=jyt̚ siː|mc=ʔit si|oc-bs=Ɂik si}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Wood Snake also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Yin Wood Snake''' (乙巳, Kinoto-Mi, Otsuboku-no-Mi, Isshi) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}.
It is the 42nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}, preceded by {{ill|Jiachen|ja|甲辰}} and followed by {{ill|Bingwu|ja|丙午}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} character {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)}} represents yin {{ill|Wood (wuxing)|ja|木}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}} character {{ill|Si|ja|巳|1=Snake (zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)}} represents yin {{ill|Fire (wuxing)|ja|火}}, forming a generating ({{ill|Mutual Generation|ja|相生}}) relationship (Wood generates Fire).
== Yin Wood Snake Years == Years where the remainder when divided by 60 is 45 are Yin Wood Snake years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Snake Years''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[45]] *[[105]] *[[165]] *[[225]] *[[285]] *[[345]] *[[405]] *[[465]] *[[525]] *[[585]] *[[645]] *[[705]] *[[765]] *[[825]] *[[885]] *[[945]] | *[[1005]] *[[1065]] *[[1125]] *[[1185]] *[[1245]] *[[1305]] *[[1365]] *[[1425]] *[[1485]] *[[1545]] *[[1605]] *[[1665]] *[[1725]] *[[1785]] *[[1845]] *[[1905]] *[[1965]] | *[[2025]] *[[2085]] *[[2145]] *[[2205]] *[[2265]] *[[2325]] *[[2385]] *[[2445]] *[[2505]] *[[2565]] *[[2625]] *[[2685]] *[[2745]] *[[2805]] *[[2865]] *[[2925]] *[[2985]] |}
=== Events === * The downfall of the Soga clan by {{ill|Prince Naka no Ōe|ja|中大兄皇子}} and {{ill|Nakatomi no Kamatari|ja|中臣鎌足}} in [[645]] is known as the {{ill|Isshi Incident|ja|乙巳の変}}. * The {{ill|Eulsa Treaty|ja|第二次日韓協約}} signed in [[1905]] is referred to as the '''Eulsa''' Protection Treaty in Korea.
== Yin Wood Snake Months == April of years ending in 2 or 7 (where the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)}}) corresponds to the Yin Wood Snake {{ill|Month|ja|月}}. However, in the case of traditional calendars, the Yin Wood Snake month may be applied based on the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Lixia|ja|立夏}} to the day before {{ill|Mangzhong|ja|芒種}}).
== Yin Wood Snake Days ==
=== Special Calendar Notations === * Yin Wood Snake day is the 13th day of the {{ill|Tianyi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上}} cycle.
== See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} * {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} * {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}}

=== Events === * The downfall of the Soga clan by {{ill|Prince Naka no Ōe|ja|中大兄皇子}} and {{ill|Nakatomi no Kamatari|ja|中臣鎌足}} in [[645]] is known as the {{ill|Isshi Incident|ja|乙巳の変}}. * The {{ill|Eulsa Treaty|ja|第二次日韓協約}} signed in [[1905]] is referred to as the '''Eulsa''' Protection Treaty in Korea.
== Yin Wood Snake Months == April of years ending in 2 or 7 (where the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)}}) corresponds to the Yin Wood Snake {{ill|Month|ja|月}}. However, in the case of traditional calendars, the Yin Wood Snake month may be applied based on the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Lixia|ja|立夏}} to the day before {{ill|Mangzhong|ja|芒種}}).
== Yin Wood Snake Days ==
=== Special Calendar Notations === * Yin Wood Snake day is the 13th day of the {{ill|Tianyi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上}} cycle.
== See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} * {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} * {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "Yin-Yang and the Five Phases" to "Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory"
revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Snake|kanji=乙巳|romaji=kinoto mi|onyomi=otsushi|p=yǐsì|w=i-ssu|mi=i²¹ sɨ|y=jyut6 si6|j=jyut6 si6|ci=jyt̚ siː|mc=ʔit si|oc-bs=Ɂik si}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Wood Snake also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Yin Wood Snake''' (乙巳, Kinoto-Mi, Otsuboku-no-Mi, Isshi) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}.
It is the 42nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}, preceded by {{ill|Jiachen|ja|甲辰}} and followed by {{ill|Bingwu|ja|丙午}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} character {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)}} represents yin {{ill|Wood (wuxing)|ja|木}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}} character {{ill|Si|ja|巳|1=Snake (zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)}} represents yin {{ill|Fire (wuxing)|ja|火}}, forming a generating ({{ill|Mutual Generation|ja|相生}}) relationship (Wood generates Fire).
== Yin Wood Snake Years == Years where the remainder when divided by 60 is 45 are Yin Wood Snake years.

== Yin Wood Snake Months == April of years ending in 2 or 7 (where the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)}}) corresponds to the Yin Wood Snake {{ill|Month|ja|月}}. However, in the case of traditional calendars, the Yin Wood Snake month may be applied based on the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Lixia|ja|立夏}} to the day before {{ill|Mangzhong|ja|芒種}}).
== Yin Wood Snake Days ==
=== Special Calendar Notations === * Yin Wood Snake day is the 13th day of the {{ill|Tianyi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上}} cycle.

revision.comment: Text replacement - "↵↵== See Also ==" to "== See Also =="
revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Snake|kanji=乙巳|romaji=kinoto mi|onyomi=otsushi|p=yǐsì|w=i-ssu|mi=i²¹ sɨ|y=jyut6 si6|j=jyut6 si6|ci=jyt̚ siː|mc=ʔit si|oc-bs=Ɂik si}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Wood Snake also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Yin Wood Snake''' (乙巳, Kinoto-Mi, Otsuboku-no-Mi, Isshi) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}.
It is the 42nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}, preceded by {{ill|Jiachen|ja|甲辰}} and followed by {{ill|Bingwu|ja|丙午}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} character {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)}} represents yin {{ill|Wood (wuxing)|ja|木}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}} character {{ill|Si|ja|巳|1=Snake (zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)}} represents yin {{ill|Fire (wuxing)|ja|火}}, forming a generating ({{ill|Mutual Generation|ja|相生}}) relationship (Wood generates Fire).
== Yin Wood Snake Years == Years where the remainder when divided by 60 is 45 are Yin Wood Snake years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Snake Years''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[45]] *[[105]] *[[165]] *[[225]] *[[285]] *[[345]] *[[405]] *[[465]] *[[525]] *[[585]] *[[645]] *[[705]] *[[765]] *[[825]] *[[885]] *[[945]] | *[[1005]] *[[1065]] *[[1125]] *[[1185]] *[[1245]] *[[1305]] *[[1365]] *[[1425]] *[[1485]] *[[1545]] *[[1605]] *[[1665]] *[[1725]] *[[1785]] *[[1845]] *[[1905]] *[[1965]] | *[[2025]] *[[2085]] *[[2145]] *[[2205]] *[[2265]] *[[2325]] *[[2385]] *[[2445]] *[[2505]] *[[2565]] *[[2625]] *[[2685]] *[[2745]] *[[2805]] *[[2865]] *[[2925]] *[[2985]] |}
=== Events === * The downfall of the Soga clan by {{ill|Prince Naka no Ōe|ja|中大兄皇子}} and {{ill|Nakatomi no Kamatari|ja|中臣鎌足}} in [[645]] is known as the {{ill|Isshi Incident|ja|乙巳の変}}. * The {{ill|Eulsa Treaty|ja|第二次日韓協約}} signed in [[1905]] is referred to as the '''Eulsa''' Protection Treaty in Korea.
== Yin Wood Snake Months == April of years ending in 2 or 7 (where the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)}}) corresponds to the Yin Wood Snake {{ill|Month|ja|月}}. However, in the case of traditional calendars, the Yin Wood Snake month may be applied based on the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Lixia|ja|立夏}} to the day before {{ill|Mangzhong|ja|芒種}}).
== Yin Wood Snake Days ==
=== Special Calendar Notations === * Yin Wood Snake day is the 13th day of the {{ill|Tianyi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上}} cycle.== See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} * {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} * {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}}

[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:completion tier 5]][[Category: tier 5]][[Category: tier 5]][[Category: 5]] [[Category:Yin Wood Snake]] [[Category:QQ]] [[ja:乙巳]][[zh:乙巳]][[ko:을사]][[fr:Serpent de bois]][[de:Holz-Schlange]][[Category:11]][[ja:乙巳]][[zh:乙巳]][[ko:을사]][[fr:Serpent de bois]][[de:Holz-Schlange]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[ja:乙巳]][[zh:乙巳]][[ko:을사]][[fr:Serpent de bois]][[de:Holz-Schlange]][[Category:11]][[ja:乙巳]][[zh:乙巳]][[ko:을사]][[fr:Serpent de bois]][[de:Holz-Schlange]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[ja:乙巳]][[zh:乙巳]][[ko:을사]][[fr:Serpent de bois]][[de:Holz-Schlange]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[en:Yin Wood Snake]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[en:Yin Wood Snake]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Yin Wood Snake]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Yin Wood Snake]][[Category:11]]{{DEFAULTSORT:Yin Wood Snake}}[[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Yin Wood Snake]][[Category:11]] [[ja:乙巳]] [[ja:乙巳]][[zh:乙巳]][[ko:을사]][[fr:Serpent de bois]][[de:Holz-Schlange]] [[af:Aardehaan (astrologie)]][[cdo:Kui-cṳ̄de]][[de:Erde-Hahneen]][[en:Earth Rooster]][[fr:Coq de terreboishak]][[it:Kui-chṳ́id]][[sn:uishinja]][[ko:계유]][[nds:Erd-Hahnvi]][[vi:Quý Dậu]][[za:Gueiceij]][[zh-min-nan:Kui-chhiū]][[zh-yue:癸酉]][[zh:癸酉]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:return the see also]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Snake|kanji=乙巳|romaji=kinoto mi|onyomi=otsushi|p=yǐsì|w=i-ssu|mi=i²¹ sɨ|y=jyut6 si6|j=jyut6 si6|ci=jyt̚ siː|mc=ʔit si|oc-bs=Ɂik si}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Wood Snake also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Yin Wood Snake''' (乙巳, Kinoto-Mi, Otsuboku-no-Mi, Isshi) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}.
It is the 42nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}, preceded by {{ill|Jiachen|ja|甲辰}} and followed by {{ill|Bingwu|ja|丙午}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} character {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)}} represents yin {{ill|Wood (wuxing)|ja|木}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}} character {{ill|Si|ja|巳|1=Snake (zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)}} represents yin {{ill|Fire (wuxing)|ja|火}}, forming a generating ({{ill|Mutual Generation|ja|相生}}) relationship (Wood generates Fire).
== Yin Wood Snake Years == Years where the remainder when divided by 60 is 45 are Yin Wood Snake years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Snake Years''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[45]] *[[105]] *[[165]] *[[225]] *[[285]] *[[345]] *[[405]] *[[465]] *[[525]] *[[585]] *[[645]] *[[705]] *[[765]] *[[825]] *[[885]] *[[945]] | *[[1005]] *[[1065]] *[[1125]] *[[1185]] *[[1245]] *[[1305]] *[[1365]] *[[1425]] *[[1485]] *[[1545]] *[[1605]] *[[1665]] *[[1725]] *[[1785]] *[[1845]] *[[1905]] *[[1965]] | *[[2025]] *[[2085]] *[[2145]] *[[2205]] *[[2265]] *[[2325]] *[[2385]] *[[2445]] *[[2505]] *[[2565]] *[[2625]] *[[2685]] *[[2745]] *[[2805]] *[[2865]] *[[2925]] *[[2985]] |}
=== Events === * The downfall of the Soga clan by {{ill|Prince Naka no Ōe|ja|中大兄皇子}} and {{ill|Nakatomi no Kamatari|ja|中臣鎌足}} in [[645]] is known as the {{ill|Isshi Incident|ja|乙巳の変}}. * The {{ill|Eulsa Treaty|ja|第二次日韓協約}} signed in [[1905]] is referred to as the '''Eulsa''' Protection Treaty in Korea.
== Yin Wood Snake Months == April of years ending in 2 or 7 (where the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)}}) corresponds to the Yin Wood Snake {{ill|Month|ja|月}}. However, in the case of traditional calendars, the Yin Wood Snake month may be applied based on the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|Lixia|ja|立夏}} to the day before {{ill|Mangzhong|ja|芒種}}).
== Yin Wood Snake Days ==
=== Special Calendar Notations === * Yin Wood Snake day is the 13th day of the {{ill|Tianyi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上}} cycle. == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} * {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} * {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}}

[[cdo:Kui-cṳ̄de]][[nds:Erd-Hahnvi]][[zh-min-nan:Kui-chhiū]][[zh-yue:癸酉]] {{draft categories| [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] [[Category:completion tier 5]] [[Category:Yin Wood Snake]] [[Category:QQ]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:New]] }} [[sn:Yin Wood Snake]] [[ja:乙巳]] [[zh:乙巳]] [[ko:을사]] [[fr:Serpent de bois]] [[de:Holz-Schlange]] [[en:Yin Wood Snake]] [[af:Aardehaan (astrologie)]] [[de:Erde-Hahneen]] [[en:Earth Rooster]] [[fr:Coq de terreboishak]] [[it:Kui-chṳ́id]] [[sn:uishinja]] [[ko:계유]] [[vi:Quý Dậu]] [[za:Gueiceij]] [[zh:癸酉]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Yin Wood Snake}} [[ar:Yin Wood Snake]]

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:QQ]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Snake|kanji=乙巳|romaji=kinoto mi|onyomi=otsushi|p=yǐsì|w=i-ssu|mi=i²¹ sɨ|y=jyut6 si6|j=jyut6 si6|ci=jyt̚ siː|mc=ʔit si|oc-bs=Ɂik si}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Wood Snake also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> Yin Wood Snake''' (乙巳, Kinoto-Mi, Otsuboku-no-Mi, Isshi) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|12=draft|12=draft}}.
It is the 42nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|12=draft|12=draft}}, preceded by {{ill|Jiachen|ja|甲辰|12=draft|12=draft}} and followed by {{ill|Bingwu|ja|丙午|12=draft|12=draft}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=draft|12=draft}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干|12=draft|12=draft}} character {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=draft|12=draft}} represents yin {{ill|Wood (wuxing)|ja|木|12=draft|12=draft}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支|12=draft|12=draft}} character {{ill|Si|ja|巳|1=Snake (zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|12=draft|12=draft}} represents yin {{ill|Fire (wuxing)|ja|火|12=draft|12=draft}}, forming a generating ({{ill|Mutual Generation|ja|相生|12=draft|12=draft}}) relationship (Wood generates Fire).
== Yin Wood Snake Years == Years where the remainder when divided by 60 is 45 are Yin Wood Snake years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Snake Years''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[45]] *[[105]] *[[165]] *[[225]] *[[285]] *[[345]] *[[405]] *[[465]] *[[525]] *[[585]] *[[645]] *[[705]] *[[765]] *[[825]] *[[885]] *[[945]] | *[[1005]] *[[1065]] *[[1125]] *[[1185]] *[[1245]] *[[1305]] *[[1365]] *[[1425]] *[[1485]] *[[1545]] *[[1605]] *[[1665]] *[[1725]] *[[1785]] *[[1845]] *[[1905]] *[[1965]] | *[[2025]] *[[2085]] *[[2145]] *[[2205]] *[[2265]] *[[2325]] *[[2385]] *[[2445]] *[[2505]] *[[2565]] *[[2625]] *[[2685]] *[[2745]] *[[2805]] *[[2865]] *[[2925]] *[[2985]] |}
=== Events === * The downfall of the Soga clan by {{ill|Prince Naka no Ōe|ja|中大兄皇子|12=draft|12=draft}} and {{ill|Nakatomi no Kamatari|ja|中臣鎌足|12=draft|12=draft}} in [[645]] is known as the {{ill|Isshi Incident|ja|乙巳の変|12=draft|12=draft}}. * The {{ill|Eulsa Treaty|ja|第二次日韓協約|12=draft|12=draft}} signed in [[1905]] is referred to as the '''Eulsa''' Protection Treaty in Korea.
== Yin Wood Snake Months == April of years ending in 2 or 7 (where the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干|12=draft|12=draft}} are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=draft|12=draft}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=draft|12=draft}}) corresponds to the Yin Wood Snake {{ill|Month|ja|月|12=draft|12=draft}}. However, in the case of traditional calendars, the Yin Wood Snake month may be applied based on the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}} or {{ill|Solar terms|ja|節月|12=draft|12=draft}} (from {{ill|Lixia|ja|立夏|12=draft|12=draft}} to the day before {{ill|Mangzhong|ja|芒種|12=draft|12=draft}}).
== Yin Wood Snake Days ==
=== Special Calendar Notations === * Yin Wood Snake day is the 13th day of the {{ill|Tianyi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上|12=draft|12=draft}} cycle. == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支|12=draft|12=draft}}
[[cdo:Kui-cṳ̄de]][[nds:Erd-Hahnvi]][[zh-min-nan:Kui-chhiū]][[zh-yue:癸酉]] {{draft categories| [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] [[Category:completion tier 5]] [[Category:Yin Wood Snake]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:New]] }} [[sn:Yin Wood Snake]] [[ja:乙巳]] [[zh:乙巳]] [[ko:을사]] [[fr:Serpent de bois]] [[de:Holz-Schlange]] [[en:Yin Wood Snake]] [[af:Aardehaan (astrologie)]] [[de:Erde-Hahneen]] [[en:Earth Rooster]] [[fr:Coq de terreboishak]] [[it:Kui-chṳ́id]] [[sn:uishinja]] [[ko:계유]] [[vi:Quý Dậu]] [[za:Gueiceij]] [[zh:癸酉]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Yin Wood Snake}} [[ar:Yin Wood Snake]]

شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|qq=}}, forming a generating ([[:en:Aioi|Mutual Generation]]) relationship (Wood generates Fire).
== Yin Wood Snake Years == Years where the remainder when divided by 60 is 45 are Yin Wood Snake years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Snake Years''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[45]] *[[105]] *[[165]] *[[225]] *[[285]] *[[345]] *[[405]] *[[465]] *[[525]] *[[585]] *[[645]] *[[705]] *[[765]] *[[825]] *[[885]] *[[945]] | *[[1005]] *[[1065]] *[[1125]] *[[1185]] *[[1245]] *[[1305]] *[[1365]] *[[1425]] *[[1485]] *[[1545]] *[[1605]] *[[1665]] *[[1725]] *[[1785]] *[[1845]] *[[1905]] *[[1965]] | *[[2025]] *[[2085]] *[[2145]] *[[2205]] *[[2265]] *[[2325]] *[[2385]] *[[2445]] *[[2505]] *[[2565]] *[[2625]] *[[2685]] *[[2745]] *[[2805]] *[[2865]] *[[2925]] *[[2985]] |}
=== Events === * The downfall of the Soga clan by {{ill|Prince Naka no Ōe|ja|中大兄皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|qq=}} and {{ill|Nakatomi no Kamatari|ja|中臣鎌足|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakatomi no Kamatari|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakatomi no Kamatari|qq=}} in [[645]] is known as the [[:en:Isshi incident|Isshi Incident]]. * The [[:en:Japan–Korea Treaty of 1905|Eulsa Treaty]] signed in [[1905]] is referred to as the '''Eulsa''' Protection Treaty in Korea.
== Yin Wood Snake Months == April of years ending in 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}) corresponds to the Yin Wood Snake [[:en:Moon|Month]]. However, in the case of traditional calendars, the Yin Wood Snake month may be applied based on the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]).
== Yin Wood Snake Days ==
=== Special Calendar Notations === * Yin Wood Snake day is the 13th day of the {{ill|Tianyi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|qq=}} cycle. == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} * [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] * [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]]
[[zh-min-nan:Kui-chhiū]] [[zh-yue:癸酉]]

شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|qq=}}, forming a generating ([[:en:Aioi|Mutual Generation]]) relationship (Wood generates Fire).
== Yin Wood Snake Years == Years where the remainder when divided by 60 is 45 are Yin Wood Snake years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Snake Years''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[45]] *[[105]] *[[165]] *[[225]] *[[285]] *[[345]] *[[405]] *[[465]] *[[525]] *[[585]] *[[645]] *[[705]] *[[765]] *[[825]] *[[885]] *[[945]] | *[[1005]] *[[1065]] *[[1125]] *[[1185]] *[[1245]] *[[1305]] *[[1365]] *[[1425]] *[[1485]] *[[1545]] *[[1605]] *[[1665]] *[[1725]] *[[1785]] *[[1845]] *[[1905]] *[[1965]] | *[[2025]] *[[2085]] *[[2145]] *[[2205]] *[[2265]] *[[2325]] *[[2385]] *[[2445]] *[[2505]] *[[2565]] *[[2625]] *[[2685]] *[[2745]] *[[2805]] *[[2865]] *[[2925]] *[[2985]] |}
=== Events === * The downfall of the Soga clan by {{ill|Prince Naka no Ōe|ja|中大兄皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|qq=}} and {{ill|Nakatomi no Kamatari|ja|中臣鎌足|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakatomi no Kamatari|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakatomi no Kamatari|qq=}} in [[645]] is known as the [[:en:Isshi incident|Isshi Incident]]. * The [[:en:Japan–Korea Treaty of 1905|Eulsa Treaty]] signed in [[1905]] is referred to as the '''Eulsa''' Protection Treaty in Korea.
== Yin Wood Snake Months == April of years ending in 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}) corresponds to the Yin Wood Snake [[:en:Moon|Month]]. However, in the case of traditional calendars, the Yin Wood Snake month may be applied based on the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]).
== Yin Wood Snake Days ==
=== Special Calendar Notations === * Yin Wood Snake day is the 13th day of the {{ill|Tianyi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|qq=}} cycle. == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} * [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] * [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]]

==Pronunciation== ==Years of Yin Wood Snake== Years where the remainder when divided by 60 is 45 are Yin Wood Snake years.

=== Events === * The downfall of the Soga clan by {{ill|Prince Naka no Ōe|ja|中大兄皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|qq=}} and {{ill|Nakatomi no Kamatari|ja|中臣鎌足|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakatomi no Kamatari|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakatomi no Kamatari|qq=}} in [[645]] is known as the [[:en:Isshi incident|Isshi Incident]]. * The [[:en:Japan–Korea Treaty of 1905|Eulsa Treaty]] signed in [[1905]] is referred to as the '''Eulsa''' Protection Treaty in Korea. ==Months of Yin Wood Snake== == Yin Wood Snake Months == April of years ending in 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}) corresponds to the Yin Wood Snake [[:en:Moon|Month]]. However, in the case of traditional calendars, the Yin Wood Snake month may be applied based on the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]). ==Days of Yin Wood Snake== == Yin Wood Snake Days ==
=== Special Calendar Notations === * Yin Wood Snake day is the 13th day of the {{ill|Tianyi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|qq=}} cycle. == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} * [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] * [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]]
[[zh-min-nan:Kui-chhiū]] [[zh-yue:癸酉]]

== Yin Wood Snake Years == Years where the remainder when divided by 60 is 45 are Yin Wood Snake years.

=== Events === * The downfall of the Soga clan by {{ill|Prince Naka no Ōe|ja|中大兄皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|qq=}} and {{ill|Nakatomi no Kamatari|ja|中臣鎌足|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakatomi no Kamatari|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakatomi no Kamatari|qq=}} in [[645]] is known as the [[:en:Isshi incident|Isshi Incident]]. * The [[:en:Japan–Korea Treaty of 1905|Eulsa Treaty]] signed in [[1905]] is referred to as the '''Eulsa''' Protection Treaty in Korea.
== Yin Wood Snake Months == April of years ending in 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}) corresponds to the Yin Wood Snake [[:en:Moon|Month]]. However, in the case of traditional calendars, the Yin Wood Snake month may be applied based on the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]).
== Yin Wood Snake Days ==
=== Special Calendar Notations === * Yin Wood Snake day is the 13th day of the {{ill|Tianyi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|qq=}} cycle. == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} * [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] * [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]]

==Pronunciation== ==Years of Yin Wood Snake== Years where the remainder when divided by 60 is 45 are Yin Wood Snake years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Snake Years''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[45]] *[[105]] *[[165]] *[[225]] *[[285]] *[[345]] *[[405]] *[[465]] *[[525]] *[[585]] *[[645]] *[[705]] *[[765]] *[[825]] *[[885]] *[[945]] | *[[1005]] *[[1065]] *[[1125]] *[[1185]] *[[1245]] *[[1305]] *[[1365]] *[[1425]] *[[1485]] *[[1545]] *[[1605]] *[[1665]] *[[1725]] *[[1785]] *[[1845]] *[[1905]] *[[1965]] | *[[2025]] *[[2085]] *[[2145]] *[[2205]] *[[2265]] *[[2325]] *[[2385]] *[[2445]] *[[2505]] *[[2565]] *[[2625]] *[[2685]] *[[2745]] *[[2805]] *[[2865]] *[[2925]] *[[2985]] |}
=== Events === * The downfall of the Soga clan by {{ill|Prince Naka no Ōe|ja|中大兄皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|qq=}} and {{ill|Nakatomi no Kamatari|ja|中臣鎌足|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakatomi no Kamatari|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakatomi no Kamatari|qq=}} in [[645]] is known as the [[:en:Isshi incident|Isshi Incident]]. * The [[:en:Japan–Korea Treaty of 1905|Eulsa Treaty]] signed in [[1905]] is referred to as the '''Eulsa''' Protection Treaty in Korea.
==Months of Yin Wood Snake== April of years ending in 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}) corresponds to the Yin Wood Snake [[:en:Moon|Month]]. However, in the case of traditional calendars, the Yin Wood Snake month may be applied based on the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]).
==Days of Yin Wood Snake==
=== Special Calendar Notations === * Yin Wood Snake day is the 13th day of the {{ill|Tianyi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|qq=}} cycle. == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} * [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] * [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]]

It is the 42nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}, preceded by {{ill|Jiachen|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiachen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiachen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Bingwu|ja|1=Yang Fire Horse|2=ja|丙午|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Horse|qq=}}. ==Pronunciation== PronounceYin Wood Snake
==Years of Yin Wood Snake== Years where the remainder when divided by 60 is 45 are Yin Wood Snake years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Snake Years''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[45]] *[[105]] *[[165]] *[[225]] *[[285]] *[[345]] *[[405]] *[[465]] *[[525]] *[[585]] *[[645]] *[[705]] *[[765]] *[[825]] *[[885]] *[[945]] | *[[1005]] *[[1065]] *[[1125]] *[[1185]] *[[1245]] *[[1305]] *[[1365]] *[[1425]] *[[1485]] *[[1545]] *[[1605]] *[[1665]] *[[1725]] *[[1785]] *[[1845]] *[[1905]] *[[1965]] | *[[2025]] *[[2085]] *[[2145]] *[[2205]] *[[2265]] *[[2325]] *[[2385]] *[[2445]] *[[2505]] *[[2565]] *[[2625]] *[[2685]] *[[2745]] *[[2805]] *[[2865]] *[[2925]] *[[2985]] |}
=== Events === * The downfall of the Soga clan by {{ill|Prince Naka no Ōe|ja|中大兄皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|qq=}} and {{ill|Nakatomi no Kamatari|ja|中臣鎌足|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakatomi no Kamatari|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakatomi no Kamatari|qq=}} in [[645]] is known as the [[:en:Isshi incident|Isshi Incident]]. * The [[:en:Japan–Korea Treaty of 1905|Eulsa Treaty]] signed in [[1905]] is referred to as the '''Eulsa''' Protection Treaty in Korea.
==Months of Yin Wood Snake== April of years ending in 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}) corresponds to the Yin Wood Snake [[:en:Moon|Month]]. However, in the case of traditional calendars, the Yin Wood Snake month may be applied based on the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]).
==Days of Yin Wood Snake==
=== Special Calendar Notations === * Yin Wood Snake day is the 13th day of the {{ill|Tianyi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|qq=}} cycle. == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} * [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] * [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]]
[[zh-min-nan:Kui-chhiū]] [[zh-yue:癸酉]]

==Pronunciation== * Yin Wood Snake (乙巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 sei3 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのとみ (kinoto-mi) ***Onyomi: おつかのみ (otsuka-no-mi) ***Onyomi: おつび (otsubi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulsa ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Tỵ
==Years of Yin Wood Snake== Years where the remainder when divided by 60 is 45 are Yin Wood Snake years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Snake Years''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[45]] *[[105]] *[[165]] *[[225]] *[[285]] *[[345]] *[[405]] *[[465]] *[[525]] *[[585]] *[[645]] *[[705]] *[[765]] *[[825]] *[[885]] *[[945]] | *[[1005]] *[[1065]] *[[1125]] *[[1185]] *[[1245]] *[[1305]] *[[1365]] *[[1425]] *[[1485]] *[[1545]] *[[1605]] *[[1665]] *[[1725]] *[[1785]] *[[1845]] *[[1905]] *[[1965]] | *[[2025]] *[[2085]] *[[2145]] *[[2205]] *[[2265]] *[[2325]] *[[2385]] *[[2445]] *[[2505]] *[[2565]] *[[2625]] *[[2685]] *[[2745]] *[[2805]] *[[2865]] *[[2925]] *[[2985]] |}
=== Events === * The downfall of the Soga clan by {{ill|Prince Naka no Ōe|ja|中大兄皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|qq=}} and {{ill|Nakatomi no Kamatari|ja|中臣鎌足|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakatomi no Kamatari|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakatomi no Kamatari|qq=}} in [[645]] is known as the [[:en:Isshi incident|Isshi Incident]]. * The [[:en:Japan–Korea Treaty of 1905|Eulsa Treaty]] signed in [[1905]] is referred to as the '''Eulsa''' Protection Treaty in Korea.
==Months of Yin Wood Snake== April of years ending in 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}) corresponds to the Yin Wood Snake [[:en:Moon|Month]]. However, in the case of traditional calendars, the Yin Wood Snake month may be applied based on the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]).
==Days of Yin Wood Snake==
=== Special Calendar Notations === * Yin Wood Snake day is the 13th day of the {{ill|Tianyi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|qq=}} cycle. == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} * [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] * [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]]

شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|qq=}}, forming a generating ([[:en:Aioi|Mutual Generation]]) relationship (Wood generates Fire).
==Pronunciation== * Yin Wood Snake (乙巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 sei3 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのとみ (kinoto-mi) ***Onyomi: おつかのみ (otsuka-no-mi) ***Onyomi: おつび (otsubi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulsa ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Tỵ
==Years of Yin Wood Snake== Years where the remainder when divided by 60 is 45 are Yin Wood Snake years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Snake Years''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[45]] *[[105]] *[[165]] *[[225]] *[[285]] *[[345]] *[[405]] *[[465]] *[[525]] *[[585]] *[[645]] *[[705]] *[[765]] *[[825]] *[[885]] *[[945]] | *[[1005]] *[[1065]] *[[1125]] *[[1185]] *[[1245]] *[[1305]] *[[1365]] *[[1425]] *[[1485]] *[[1545]] *[[1605]] *[[1665]] *[[1725]] *[[1785]] *[[1845]] *[[1905]] *[[1965]] | *[[2025]] *[[2085]] *[[2145]] *[[2205]] *[[2265]] *[[2325]] *[[2385]] *[[2445]] *[[2505]] *[[2565]] *[[2625]] *[[2685]] *[[2745]] *[[2805]] *[[2865]] *[[2925]] *[[2985]] |}
=== Events === * The downfall of the Soga clan by {{ill|Prince Naka no Ōe|ja|中大兄皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|qq=}} and {{ill|Nakatomi no Kamatari|ja|中臣鎌足|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakatomi no Kamatari|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakatomi no Kamatari|qq=}} in [[645]] is known as the [[:en:Isshi incident|Isshi Incident]]. * The [[:en:Japan–Korea Treaty of 1905|Eulsa Treaty]] signed in [[1905]] is referred to as the '''Eulsa''' Protection Treaty in Korea.
==Months of Yin Wood Snake== April of years ending in 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}) corresponds to the Yin Wood Snake [[:en:Moon|Month]]. However, in the case of traditional calendars, the Yin Wood Snake month may be applied based on the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]).
==Days of Yin Wood Snake==
=== Special Calendar Notations === * Yin Wood Snake day is the 13th day of the {{ill|Tianyi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|qq=}} cycle. == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} * [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] * [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]]
[[zh-min-nan:Kui-chhiū]] [[zh-yue:癸酉]]

It is the 42nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}, preceded by {{ill|Jiachen|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiachen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiachen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Bingwu|ja|1=Yang Fire Horse|2=ja|丙午|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Horse|qq=}}. شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|qq=}}, forming a generating ([[:en:Aioi|Mutual Generation]]) relationship (Wood generates Fire).
==Pronunciation== PronounciationYin Wood Snake \n<!-- == * Yin Wood Snake (乙巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 sei3 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのとみ (kinoto-mi) ***Onyomi: おつかのみ (otsuka-no-mi) ***Onyomi: おつび (otsubi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulsa ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Tỵ
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Snake== Years where the remainder when divided by 60 is 45 are Yin Wood Snake years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Snake Years''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[45]] *[[105]] *[[165]] *[[225]] *[[285]] *[[345]] *[[405]] *[[465]] *[[525]] *[[585]] *[[645]] *[[705]] *[[765]] *[[825]] *[[885]] *[[945]] | *[[1005]] *[[1065]] *[[1125]] *[[1185]] *[[1245]] *[[1305]] *[[1365]] *[[1425]] *[[1485]] *[[1545]] *[[1605]] *[[1665]] *[[1725]] *[[1785]] *[[1845]] *[[1905]] *[[1965]] | *[[2025]] *[[2085]] *[[2145]] *[[2205]] *[[2265]] *[[2325]] *[[2385]] *[[2445]] *[[2505]] *[[2565]] *[[2625]] *[[2685]] *[[2745]] *[[2805]] *[[2865]] *[[2925]] *[[2985]] |}
=== Events === * The downfall of the Soga clan by {{ill|Prince Naka no Ōe|ja|中大兄皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|qq=}} and {{ill|Nakatomi no Kamatari|ja|中臣鎌足|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakatomi no Kamatari|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakatomi no Kamatari|qq=}} in [[645]] is known as the [[:en:Isshi incident|Isshi Incident]]. * The [[:en:Japan–Korea Treaty of 1905|Eulsa Treaty]] signed in [[1905]] is referred to as the '''Eulsa''' Protection Treaty in Korea.
==Months of Yin Wood Snake== April of years ending in 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}) corresponds to the Yin Wood Snake [[:en:Moon|Month]]. However, in the case of traditional calendars, the Yin Wood Snake month may be applied based on the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]).
==Days of Yin Wood Snake==
=== Special Calendar Notations === * Yin Wood Snake day is the 13th day of the {{ill|Tianyi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|qq=}} cycle. == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} * [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] * [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]]
[[zh-min-nan:Kui-chhiū]] [[zh-yue:癸酉]]

شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|qq=}}, forming a generating ([[:en:Aioi|Mutual Generation]]) relationship (Wood generates Fire).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Wood Snake (乙巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 si6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-mi ***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-mi ***Onyomi 1: itsi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eulsa (을사) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Tỵ
<!-- == * Yin Wood Snake (乙巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 sei3 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのとみ (kinoto-mi) ***Onyomi: おつかのみ (otsuka-no-mi) ***Onyomi: おつび (otsubi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulsa ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Tỵ
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Snake== Years where the remainder when divided by 60 is 45 are Yin Wood Snake years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Snake Years''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[45]] *[[105]] *[[165]] *[[225]] *[[285]] *[[345]] *[[405]] *[[465]] *[[525]] *[[585]] *[[645]] *[[705]] *[[765]] *[[825]] *[[885]] *[[945]] | *[[1005]] *[[1065]] *[[1125]] *[[1185]] *[[1245]] *[[1305]] *[[1365]] *[[1425]] *[[1485]] *[[1545]] *[[1605]] *[[1665]] *[[1725]] *[[1785]] *[[1845]] *[[1905]] *[[1965]] | *[[2025]] *[[2085]] *[[2145]] *[[2205]] *[[2265]] *[[2325]] *[[2385]] *[[2445]] *[[2505]] *[[2565]] *[[2625]] *[[2685]] *[[2745]] *[[2805]] *[[2865]] *[[2925]] *[[2985]] |}
=== Events === * The downfall of the Soga clan by {{ill|Prince Naka no Ōe|ja|中大兄皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|qq=}} and {{ill|Nakatomi no Kamatari|ja|中臣鎌足|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakatomi no Kamatari|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakatomi no Kamatari|qq=}} in [[645]] is known as the [[:en:Isshi incident|Isshi Incident]]. * The [[:en:Japan–Korea Treaty of 1905|Eulsa Treaty]] signed in [[1905]] is referred to as the '''Eulsa''' Protection Treaty in Korea.
==Months of Yin Wood Snake== April of years ending in 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}) corresponds to the Yin Wood Snake [[:en:Moon|Month]]. However, in the case of traditional calendars, the Yin Wood Snake month may be applied based on the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]).
==Days of Yin Wood Snake==
=== Special Calendar Notations === * Yin Wood Snake day is the 13th day of the {{ill|Tianyi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|qq=}} cycle. == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} * [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] * [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]]
[[zh-min-nan:Kui-chhiū]] [[zh-yue:癸酉]]
