Generation]]) relationship (Wood generates Fire).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Wood Snake (乙巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 si6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-mi ***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-mi ***Onyomi 1: itsi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eulsa (을사) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Tỵ
<!-- == * Yin Wood Snake (乙巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 sei3 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのとみ (kinoto-mi) ***Onyomi: おつかのみ (otsuka-no-mi) ***Onyomi: おつび (otsubi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulsa ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Tỵ
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Snake== Years where the remainder when divided by 60 is 45 are Yin Wood Snake years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Snake Years''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[45]] *[[:en:105|105]] *[[:en:165|165]] *[[225]] *[[285]] *[[345]] *[[405]] *[[465]] *[[525]] *[[585]] *[[645]] *[[705]] *[[765]] *[[825]] *[[885]] *[[945]] | *[[:en:1005|1005]] *[[:en:1065|1065]] *[[:en:1125|1125]] *[[:en:1185|1185]] *[[:en:1245|1245]] *[[:en:1305|1305]] *[[:en:1365|1365]] *[[:en:1425|1425]] *[[:en:1485|1485]] *[[:en:1545|1545]] *[[:en:1605|1605]] *[[:en:1665|1665]] *[[:en:1725|1725]] *[[:en:1785|1785]] *[[:en:1845|1845]] *[[:en:1905|1905]] *[[1965]] | *[[2025]] *[[2085]] *[[2145]] *[[2205]] *[[2265]] *[[2325]] *[[2385]] *[[2445]] *[[2505]] *[[2565]] *[[2625]] *[[2685]] *[[2745]] *[[2805]] *[[2865]] *[[2925]] *[[2985]] |}
=== Events === * The downfall of the Soga clan by {{ill|Prince Naka no Ōe|ja|中大兄皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天智天皇}} and {{ill|Nakatomi no Kamatari|ja|中臣鎌足|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakatomi no Kamatari|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakatomi no Kamatari|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 藤原鎌足}} in [[645]] is known as the [[:en:Isshi incident|Isshi Incident]]. * The [[:en:Japan–Korea Treaty of 1905|Eulsa Treaty]] signed in [[:en:1905|1905]] is referred to as the '''Eulsa''' Protection Treaty in Korea.
==Months of Yin Wood Snake== April of years ending in 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}) corresponds to the Yin Wood Snake [[:en:Moon|Month]]. However, in the case of traditional calendars, the Yin Wood Snake month may be applied based on the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]).
==Days of Yin Wood Snake==
=== Special Calendar Notations === * Yin Wood Snake day is the 13th day of the {{ill|Tianyi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天一神}} cycle. == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] * [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]]

<!-- == * Yin Wood Snake (乙巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 sei3 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのとみ (kinoto-mi) ***Onyomi: おつかのみ (otsuka-no-mi) ***Onyomi: おつび (otsubi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulsa ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Tỵ
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Snake== Years where the remainder when divided by 60 is 45 are Yin Wood Snake years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Snake Years''' |- ![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[45]] *[[:en:105|105]] *[[:en:165|165]] *[[225]] *[[285]] *[[345]] *[[405]] *[[465]] *[[525]] *[[585]] *[[645]] *[[705]] *[[765]] *[[825]] *[[885]] *[[945]] | *[[:en:1005|1005]] *[[:en:1065|1065]] *[[:en:1125|1125]] *[[:en:1185|1185]] *[[:en:1245|1245]] *[[:en:1305|1305]] *[[:en:1365|1365]] *[[:en:1425|1425]] *[[:en:1485|1485]] *[[:en:1545|1545]] *[[:en:1605|1605]] *[[:en:1665|1665]] *[[:en:1725|1725]] *[[:en:1785|1785]] *[[:en:1845|1845]] *[[:en:1905|1905]] *[[:en:1965|1965]] | *[[2025]] *[[2085]] *[[2145]] *[[2205]] *[[2265]] *[[2325]] *[[2385]] *[[2445]] *[[2505]] *[[2565]] *[[2625]] *[[2685]] *[[2745]] *[[2805]] *[[2865]] *[[2925]] *[[2985]] |}
=== Events === * The downfall of the Soga clan by {{ill|Prince Naka no Ōe|ja|中大兄皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天智天皇}} and {{ill|Nakatomi no Kamatari|ja|中臣鎌足|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakatomi no Kamatari|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakatomi no Kamatari|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 藤原鎌足}} in [[645]] is known as the [[:en:Isshi incident|Isshi Incident]]. * The [[:en:Japan–Korea Treaty of 1905|Eulsa Treaty]] signed in [[:en:1905|1905]] is referred to as the '''Eulsa''' Protection Treaty in Korea.
==Months of Yin Wood Snake== April of years ending in 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}) corresponds to the Yin Wood Snake [[:en:Moon|Month]]. However, in the case of traditional calendars, the Yin Wood Snake month may be applied based on the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]).
==Days of Yin Wood Snake==
=== Special Calendar Notations === * Yin Wood Snake day is the 13th day of the {{ill|Tianyi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天一神}} cycle. == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] * [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]]

It is the 42nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, preceded by {{ill|Jiachen|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiachen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiachen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Bingwu|ja|1=Yang Fire Horse|2=ja|丙午|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Horse|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, forming a generating ([[:en:Aioi|Mutual Generation]]) relationship (Wood generates Fire).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Wood Snake (乙巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 si6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-mi ***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-mi ***Onyomi 1: itsi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eulsa (을사) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Tỵ
<!-- == * Yin Wood Snake (乙巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 sei3 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのとみ (kinoto-mi) ***Onyomi: おつかのみ (otsuka-no-mi) ***Onyomi: おつび (otsubi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulsa ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Tỵ
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Snake== Years where the remainder when divided by 60 is 45 are Yin Wood Snake years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Snake Years''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[45]] *[[:en:105|105]] *[[:en:165|165]] *[[225]] *[[285]] *[[345]] *[[405]] *[[465]] *[[525]] *[[585]] *[[645]] *[[705]] *[[765]] *[[825]] *[[885]] *[[945]] | *[[:en:1005|1005]] *[[:en:1065|1065]] *[[:en:1125|1125]] *[[:en:1185|1185]] *[[:en:1245|1245]] *[[:en:1305|1305]] *[[:en:1365|1365]] *[[:en:1425|1425]] *[[:en:1485|1485]] *[[:en:1545|1545]] *[[:en:1605|1605]] *[[:en:1665|1665]] *[[:en:1725|1725]] *[[:en:1785|1785]] *[[:en:1845|1845]] *[[:en:1905|1905]] *[[:en:1965|1965]] | *[[:en:2025|2025]] *[[2085]] *[[2145]] *[[2205]] *[[2265]] *[[2325]] *[[2385]] *[[2445]] *[[2505]] *[[2565]] *[[2625]] *[[2685]] *[[2745]] *[[2805]] *[[2865]] *[[2925]] *[[2985]] |}
=== Events === * The downfall of the Soga clan by {{ill|Prince Naka no Ōe|ja|中大兄皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天智天皇}} and {{ill|Nakatomi no Kamatari|ja|中臣鎌足|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakatomi no Kamatari|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakatomi no Kamatari|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 藤原鎌足}} in [[645]] is known as the [[:en:Isshi incident|Isshi Incident]]. * The [[:en:Japan–Korea Treaty of 1905|Eulsa Treaty]] signed in [[:en:1905|1905]] is referred to as the '''Eulsa''' Protection Treaty in Korea.
==Months of Yin Wood Snake== April of years ending in 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}) corresponds to the Yin Wood Snake [[:en:Moon|Month]]. However, in the case of traditional calendars, the Yin Wood Snake month may be applied based on the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]).
==Days of Yin Wood Snake==
=== Special Calendar Notations === * Yin Wood Snake day is the 13th day of the {{ill|Tianyi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天一神}} cycle. == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] * [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]]

Generation]]) relationship (Wood generates Fire).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Wood Snake (乙巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 si6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-mi ***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-mi ***Onyomi 1: itsi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eulsa (을사) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Tỵ
<!-- == * Yin Wood Snake (乙巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 sei3 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのとみ (kinoto-mi) ***Onyomi: おつかのみ (otsuka-no-mi) ***Onyomi: おつび (otsubi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulsa ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Tỵ
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Snake== Years where the remainder when divided by 60 is 45 are Yin Wood Snake years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Snake Years''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[45]] *[[:en:105|105]] *[[:en:165|165]] *[[225]] *[[285]] *[[345]] *[[405]] *[[465]] *[[525]] *[[585]] *[[645]] *[[705]] *[[765]] *[[825]] *[[885]] *[[945]] | *[[:en:1005|1005]] *[[:en:1065|1065]] *[[:en:1125|1125]] *[[:en:1185|1185]] *[[:en:1245|1245]] *[[:en:1305|1305]] *[[:en:1365|1365]] *[[:en:1425|1425]] *[[:en:1485|1485]] *[[:en:1545|1545]] *[[:en:1605|1605]] *[[:en:1665|1665]] *[[:en:1725|1725]] *[[:en:1785|1785]] *[[:en:1845|1845]] *[[:en:1905|1905]] *[[:en:1965|1965]] | *[[:en:2025|2025]] *[[:en:2085|2085]] *[[2145]] *[[2205]] *[[2265]] *[[2325]] *[[2385]] *[[2445]] *[[2505]] *[[2565]] *[[2625]] *[[2685]] *[[2745]] *[[2805]] *[[2865]] *[[2925]] *[[2985]] |}
=== Events === * The downfall of the Soga clan by {{ill|Prince Naka no Ōe|ja|中大兄皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天智天皇}} and {{ill|Nakatomi no Kamatari|ja|中臣鎌足|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakatomi no Kamatari|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakatomi no Kamatari|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 藤原鎌足}} in [[645]] is known as the [[:en:Isshi incident|Isshi Incident]]. * The [[:en:Japan–Korea Treaty of 1905|Eulsa Treaty]] signed in [[:en:1905|1905]] is referred to as the '''Eulsa''' Protection Treaty in Korea.
==Months of Yin Wood Snake== April of years ending in 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}) corresponds to the Yin Wood Snake [[:en:Moon|Month]]. However, in the case of traditional calendars, the Yin Wood Snake month may be applied based on the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]).
==Days of Yin Wood Snake==
=== Special Calendar Notations === * Yin Wood Snake day is the 13th day of the {{ill|Tianyi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天一神}} cycle. == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] * [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]]

<!-- == * Yin Wood Snake (乙巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 sei3 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのとみ (kinoto-mi) ***Onyomi: おつかのみ (otsuka-no-mi) ***Onyomi: おつび (otsubi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulsa ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Tỵ
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Snake== Years where the remainder when divided by 60 is 45 are Yin Wood Snake years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Snake Years''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[45]] *[[:en:105|105]] *[[:en:165|165]] *[[225]] *[[285]] *[[345]] *[[405]] *[[465]] *[[525]] *[[585]] *[[645]] *[[705]] *[[765]] *[[825]] *[[885]] *[[945]] | *[[:en:1005|1005]] *[[:en:1065|1065]] *[[:en:1125|1125]] *[[:en:1185|1185]] *[[:en:1245|1245]] *[[:en:1305|1305]] *[[:en:1365|1365]] *[[:en:1425|1425]] *[[:en:1485|1485]] *[[:en:1545|1545]] *[[:en:1605|1605]] *[[:en:1665|1665]] *[[:en:1725|1725]] *[[:en:1785|1785]] *[[:en:1845|1845]] *[[:en:1905|1905]] *[[:en:1965|1965]] | *[[:en:2025|2025]] *[[:en:2085|2085]] *[[:en:2145|2145]] *[[2205]] *[[2265]] *[[2325]] *[[2385]] *[[2445]] *[[2505]] *[[2565]] *[[2625]] *[[2685]] *[[2745]] *[[2805]] *[[2865]] *[[2925]] *[[2985]] |}
=== Events === * The downfall of the Soga clan by {{ill|Prince Naka no Ōe|ja|中大兄皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天智天皇}} and {{ill|Nakatomi no Kamatari|ja|中臣鎌足|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakatomi no Kamatari|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakatomi no Kamatari|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 藤原鎌足}} in [[645]] is known as the [[:en:Isshi incident|Isshi Incident]]. * The [[:en:Japan–Korea Treaty of 1905|Eulsa Treaty]] signed in [[:en:1905|1905]] is referred to as the '''Eulsa''' Protection Treaty in Korea.
==Months of Yin Wood Snake== April of years ending in 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}) corresponds to the Yin Wood Snake [[:en:Moon|Month]]. However, in the case of traditional calendars, the Yin Wood Snake month may be applied based on the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]).
==Days of Yin Wood Snake==
=== Special Calendar Notations === * Yin Wood Snake day is the 13th day of the {{ill|Tianyi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天一神}} cycle. == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] * [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]]

It is the 42nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, preceded by {{ill|Jiachen|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiachen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiachen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Bingwu|ja|1=Yang Fire Horse|2=ja|丙午|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Horse|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. ==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Wood Snake (乙巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 si6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-mi ***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-mi ***Onyomi 1: itsi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eulsa (을사) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Tỵ

(У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, forming a generating ([[:en:Aioi|Mutual Generation]]) relationship (Wood generates Fire).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Wood Snake (乙巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 si6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-mi ***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-mi ***Onyomi 1: itsi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eulsa (을사) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Tỵ
<!-- == * Yin Wood Snake (乙巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 sei3 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのとみ (kinoto-mi) ***Onyomi: おつかのみ (otsuka-no-mi) ***Onyomi: おつび (otsubi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulsa ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Tỵ
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Snake== Years where the remainder when divided by 60 is 45 are Yin Wood Snake years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Snake Years''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[45]] *[[:en:105|105]] *[[:en:165|165]] *[[:en:225|225]] *[[285]] *[[345]] *[[405]] *[[465]] *[[525]] *[[585]] *[[645]] *[[705]] *[[765]] *[[825]] *[[885]] *[[945]] | *[[:en:1005|1005]] *[[:en:1065|1065]] *[[:en:1125|1125]] *[[:en:1185|1185]] *[[:en:1245|1245]] *[[:en:1305|1305]] *[[:en:1365|1365]] *[[:en:1425|1425]] *[[:en:1485|1485]] *[[:en:1545|1545]] *[[:en:1605|1605]] *[[:en:1665|1665]] *[[:en:1725|1725]] *[[:en:1785|1785]] *[[:en:1845|1845]] *[[:en:1905|1905]] *[[:en:1965|1965]] | *[[:en:2025|2025]] *[[:en:2085|2085]] *[[:en:2145|2145]] *[[:en:2205|2205]] *[[2265]] *[[2325]] *[[2385]] *[[2445]] *[[2505]] *[[2565]] *[[2625]] *[[2685]] *[[2745]] *[[2805]] *[[2865]] *[[2925]] *[[2985]] |}
=== Events === * The downfall of the Soga clan by {{ill|Prince Naka no Ōe|ja|中大兄皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天智天皇}} and {{ill|Nakatomi no Kamatari|ja|中臣鎌足|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakatomi no Kamatari|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakatomi no Kamatari|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 藤原鎌足}} in [[645]] is known as the [[:en:Isshi incident|Isshi Incident]]. * The [[:en:Japan–Korea Treaty of 1905|Eulsa Treaty]] signed in [[:en:1905|1905]] is referred to as the '''Eulsa''' Protection Treaty in Korea.
==Months of Yin Wood Snake== April of years ending in 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}) corresponds to the Yin Wood Snake [[:en:Moon|Month]]. However, in the case of traditional calendars, the Yin Wood Snake month may be applied based on the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]).
==Days of Yin Wood Snake==
=== Special Calendar Notations === * Yin Wood Snake day is the 13th day of the {{ill|Tianyi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天一神}} cycle. == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] * [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]]

Generation]]) relationship (Wood generates Fire).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Wood Snake (乙巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 si6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-mi ***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-mi ***Onyomi 1: itsi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eulsa (을사) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Tỵ
<!-- == * Yin Wood Snake (乙巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 sei3 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのとみ (kinoto-mi) ***Onyomi: おつかのみ (otsuka-no-mi) ***Onyomi: おつび (otsubi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulsa ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Tỵ
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Snake== Years where the remainder when divided by 60 is 45 are Yin Wood Snake years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Snake Years''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[45]] *[[:en:105|105]] *[[:en:165|165]] *[[:en:225|225]] *[[285]] *[[345]] *[[405]] *[[465]] *[[525]] *[[585]] *[[645]] *[[705]] *[[765]] *[[825]] *[[885]] *[[945]] | *[[:en:1005|1005]] *[[:en:1065|1065]] *[[:en:1125|1125]] *[[:en:1185|1185]] *[[:en:1245|1245]] *[[:en:1305|1305]] *[[:en:1365|1365]] *[[:en:1425|1425]] *[[:en:1485|1485]] *[[:en:1545|1545]] *[[:en:1605|1605]] *[[:en:1665|1665]] *[[:en:1725|1725]] *[[:en:1785|1785]] *[[:en:1845|1845]] *[[:en:1905|1905]] *[[:en:1965|1965]] | *[[:en:2025|2025]] *[[:en:2085|2085]] *[[:en:2145|2145]] *[[:en:2205|2205]] *[[:en:2265|2265]] *[[2325]] *[[2385]] *[[2445]] *[[2505]] *[[2565]] *[[2625]] *[[2685]] *[[2745]] *[[2805]] *[[2865]] *[[2925]] *[[2985]] |}
=== Events === * The downfall of the Soga clan by {{ill|Prince Naka no Ōe|ja|中大兄皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天智天皇}} and {{ill|Nakatomi no Kamatari|ja|中臣鎌足|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakatomi no Kamatari|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakatomi no Kamatari|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 藤原鎌足}} in [[645]] is known as the [[:en:Isshi incident|Isshi Incident]]. * The [[:en:Japan–Korea Treaty of 1905|Eulsa Treaty]] signed in [[:en:1905|1905]] is referred to as the '''Eulsa''' Protection Treaty in Korea.
==Months of Yin Wood Snake== April of years ending in 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}) corresponds to the Yin Wood Snake [[:en:Moon|Month]]. However, in the case of traditional calendars, the Yin Wood Snake month may be applied based on the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]).
==Days of Yin Wood Snake==
=== Special Calendar Notations === * Yin Wood Snake day is the 13th day of the {{ill|Tianyi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天一神}} cycle. == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] * [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]]

==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Wood Snake (乙巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 si6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-mi ***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-mi ***Onyomi 1: itsi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eulsa (을사) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Tỵ
<!-- == * Yin Wood Snake (乙巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 sei3 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのとみ (kinoto-mi) ***Onyomi: おつかのみ (otsuka-no-mi) ***Onyomi: おつび (otsubi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulsa ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Tỵ
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Snake== Years where the remainder when divided by 60 is 45 are Yin Wood Snake years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Snake Years''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[45]] *[[:en:105|105]] *[[:en:165|165]] *[[:en:225|225]] *[[285]] *[[345]] *[[405]] *[[465]] *[[525]] *[[585]] *[[645]] *[[705]] *[[765]] *[[825]] *[[885]] *[[945]] | *[[:en:1005|1005]] *[[:en:1065|1065]] *[[:en:1125|1125]] *[[:en:1185|1185]] *[[:en:1245|1245]] *[[:en:1305|1305]] *[[:en:1365|1365]] *[[:en:1425|1425]] *[[:en:1485|1485]] *[[:en:1545|1545]] *[[:en:1605|1605]] *[[:en:1665|1665]] *[[:en:1725|1725]] *[[:en:1785|1785]] *[[:en:1845|1845]] *[[:en:1905|1905]] *[[:en:1965|1965]] | *[[:en:2025|2025]] *[[:en:2085|2085]] *[[:en:2145|2145]] *[[:en:2205|2205]] *[[:en:2265|2265]] *[[:en:2325|2325]] *[[2385]] *[[2445]] *[[2505]] *[[2565]] *[[2625]] *[[2685]] *[[2745]] *[[2805]] *[[2865]] *[[2925]] *[[2985]] |}
=== Events === * The downfall of the Soga clan by {{ill|Prince Naka no Ōe|ja|中大兄皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天智天皇}} and {{ill|Nakatomi no Kamatari|ja|中臣鎌足|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakatomi no Kamatari|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakatomi no Kamatari|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 藤原鎌足}} in [[645]] is known as the [[:en:Isshi incident|Isshi Incident]]. * The [[:en:Japan–Korea Treaty of 1905|Eulsa Treaty]] signed in [[:en:1905|1905]] is referred to as the '''Eulsa''' Protection Treaty in Korea.
==Months of Yin Wood Snake== April of years ending in 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}) corresponds to the Yin Wood Snake [[:en:Moon|Month]]. However, in the case of traditional calendars, the Yin Wood Snake month may be applied based on the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]).
==Days of Yin Wood Snake==
=== Special Calendar Notations === * Yin Wood Snake day is the 13th day of the {{ill|Tianyi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天一神}} cycle. == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] * [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]]

(У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, forming a generating ([[:en:Aioi|Mutual Generation]]) relationship (Wood generates Fire).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Wood Snake (乙巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 si6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-mi ***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-mi ***Onyomi 1: itsi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eulsa (을사) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Tỵ
<!-- == * Yin Wood Snake (乙巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 sei3 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのとみ (kinoto-mi) ***Onyomi: おつかのみ (otsuka-no-mi) ***Onyomi: おつび (otsubi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulsa ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Tỵ
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Snake== Years where the remainder when divided by 60 is 45 are Yin Wood Snake years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Snake Years''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[45]] *[[:en:105|105]] *[[:en:165|165]] *[[:en:225|225]] *[[285]] *[[345]] *[[405]] *[[465]] *[[525]] *[[585]] *[[645]] *[[705]] *[[765]] *[[825]] *[[885]] *[[945]] | *[[:en:1005|1005]] *[[:en:1065|1065]] *[[:en:1125|1125]] *[[:en:1185|1185]] *[[:en:1245|1245]] *[[:en:1305|1305]] *[[:en:1365|1365]] *[[:en:1425|1425]] *[[:en:1485|1485]] *[[:en:1545|1545]] *[[:en:1605|1605]] *[[:en:1665|1665]] *[[:en:1725|1725]] *[[:en:1785|1785]] *[[:en:1845|1845]] *[[:en:1905|1905]] *[[:en:1965|1965]] | *[[:en:2025|2025]] *[[:en:2085|2085]] *[[:en:2145|2145]] *[[:en:2205|2205]] *[[:en:2265|2265]] *[[:en:2325|2325]] *[[:en:2385|2385]] *[[:en:2445|2445]] *[[2505]] *[[2565]] *[[2625]] *[[2685]] *[[2745]] *[[2805]] *[[2865]] *[[2925]] *[[2985]] |}
=== Events === * The downfall of the Soga clan by {{ill|Prince Naka no Ōe|ja|中大兄皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天智天皇}} and {{ill|Nakatomi no Kamatari|ja|中臣鎌足|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakatomi no Kamatari|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakatomi no Kamatari|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 藤原鎌足}} in [[645]] is known as the [[:en:Isshi incident|Isshi Incident]]. * The [[:en:Japan–Korea Treaty of 1905|Eulsa Treaty]] signed in [[:en:1905|1905]] is referred to as the '''Eulsa''' Protection Treaty in Korea.
==Months of Yin Wood Snake== April of years ending in 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}) corresponds to the Yin Wood Snake [[:en:Moon|Month]]. However, in the case of traditional calendars, the Yin Wood Snake month may be applied based on the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]).
==Days of Yin Wood Snake==
=== Special Calendar Notations === * Yin Wood Snake day is the 13th day of the {{ill|Tianyi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天一神}} cycle. == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] * [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]]

Generation]]) relationship (Wood generates Fire).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Wood Snake (乙巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 si6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-mi ***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-mi ***Onyomi 1: itsi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eulsa (을사) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Tỵ
<!-- == * Yin Wood Snake (乙巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 sei3 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのとみ (kinoto-mi) ***Onyomi: おつかのみ (otsuka-no-mi) ***Onyomi: おつび (otsubi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulsa ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Tỵ
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Snake== Years where the remainder when divided by 60 is 45 are Yin Wood Snake years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Snake Years''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[45]] *[[:en:105|105]] *[[:en:165|165]] *[[:en:225|225]] *[[:en:285|285]] *[[345]] *[[405]] *[[465]] *[[525]] *[[585]] *[[645]] *[[705]] *[[765]] *[[825]] *[[885]] *[[945]] | *[[:en:1005|1005]] *[[:en:1065|1065]] *[[:en:1125|1125]] *[[:en:1185|1185]] *[[:en:1245|1245]] *[[:en:1305|1305]] *[[:en:1365|1365]] *[[:en:1425|1425]] *[[:en:1485|1485]] *[[:en:1545|1545]] *[[:en:1605|1605]] *[[:en:1665|1665]] *[[:en:1725|1725]] *[[:en:1785|1785]] *[[:en:1845|1845]] *[[:en:1905|1905]] *[[:en:1965|1965]] | *[[:en:2025|2025]] *[[:en:2085|2085]] *[[:en:2145|2145]] *[[:en:2205|2205]] *[[:en:2265|2265]] *[[:en:2325|2325]] *[[:en:2385|2385]] *[[:en:2445|2445]] *[[2505]] *[[2565]] *[[2625]] *[[2685]] *[[2745]] *[[2805]] *[[2865]] *[[2925]] *[[2985]] |}
=== Events === * The downfall of the Soga clan by {{ill|Prince Naka no Ōe|ja|中大兄皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天智天皇}} and {{ill|Nakatomi no Kamatari|ja|中臣鎌足|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakatomi no Kamatari|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakatomi no Kamatari|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 藤原鎌足}} in [[645]] is known as the [[:en:Isshi incident|Isshi Incident]]. * The [[:en:Japan–Korea Treaty of 1905|Eulsa Treaty]] signed in [[:en:1905|1905]] is referred to as the '''Eulsa''' Protection Treaty in Korea.
==Months of Yin Wood Snake== April of years ending in 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}) corresponds to the Yin Wood Snake [[:en:Moon|Month]]. However, in the case of traditional calendars, the Yin Wood Snake month may be applied based on the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]).
==Days of Yin Wood Snake==
=== Special Calendar Notations === * Yin Wood Snake day is the 13th day of the {{ill|Tianyi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天一神}} cycle. == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] * [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]]

(wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, forming a generating ([[:en:Aioi|Mutual Generation]]) relationship (Wood generates Fire).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Wood Snake (乙巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 si6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-mi ***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-mi ***Onyomi 1: itsi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eulsa (을사) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Tỵ
<!-- == * Yin Wood Snake (乙巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 sei3 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのとみ (kinoto-mi) ***Onyomi: おつかのみ (otsuka-no-mi) ***Onyomi: おつび (otsubi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulsa ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Tỵ
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Snake== Years where the remainder when divided by 60 is 45 are Yin Wood Snake years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Snake Years''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[45]] *[[:en:105|105]] *[[:en:165|165]] *[[:en:225|225]] *[[:en:285|285]] *[[345]] *[[405]] *[[465]] *[[525]] *[[585]] *[[645]] *[[705]] *[[765]] *[[825]] *[[885]] *[[945]] | *[[:en:1005|1005]] *[[:en:1065|1065]] *[[:en:1125|1125]] *[[:en:1185|1185]] *[[:en:1245|1245]] *[[:en:1305|1305]] *[[:en:1365|1365]] *[[:en:1425|1425]] *[[:en:1485|1485]] *[[:en:1545|1545]] *[[:en:1605|1605]] *[[:en:1665|1665]] *[[:en:1725|1725]] *[[:en:1785|1785]] *[[:en:1845|1845]] *[[:en:1905|1905]] *[[:en:1965|1965]] | *[[:en:2025|2025]] *[[:en:2085|2085]] *[[:en:2145|2145]] *[[:en:2205|2205]] *[[:en:2265|2265]] *[[:en:2325|2325]] *[[:en:2385|2385]] *[[:en:2445|2445]] *[[2505]] *[[2565]] *[[2625]] *[[2685]] *[[2745]] *[[2805]] *[[2865]] *[[:en:2925|2925]] *[[2985]] |}
=== Events === * The downfall of the Soga clan by {{ill|Prince Naka no Ōe|ja|中大兄皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天智天皇}} and {{ill|Nakatomi no Kamatari|ja|中臣鎌足|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakatomi no Kamatari|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakatomi no Kamatari|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 藤原鎌足}} in [[645]] is known as the [[:en:Isshi incident|Isshi Incident]]. * The [[:en:Japan–Korea Treaty of 1905|Eulsa Treaty]] signed in [[:en:1905|1905]] is referred to as the '''Eulsa''' Protection Treaty in Korea.
==Months of Yin Wood Snake== April of years ending in 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}) corresponds to the Yin Wood Snake [[:en:Moon|Month]]. However, in the case of traditional calendars, the Yin Wood Snake month may be applied based on the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]).
==Days of Yin Wood Snake==
=== Special Calendar Notations === * Yin Wood Snake day is the 13th day of the {{ill|Tianyi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天一神}} cycle. == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] * [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]]

However, in the case of traditional calendars, the Yin Wood Snake month may be applied based on the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]).
==Days of Yin Wood Snake==
=== Special Calendar Notations === * Yin Wood Snake day is the 13th day of the {{ill|Tianyi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天一神}} cycle. == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] * [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]]

(У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, forming a generating ([[:en:Aioi|Mutual Generation]]) relationship (Wood generates Fire).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Wood Snake (乙巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 si6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-mi ***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-mi ***Onyomi 1: itsi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eulsa (을사) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Tỵ
<!-- == * Yin Wood Snake (乙巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 sei3 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのとみ (kinoto-mi) ***Onyomi: おつかのみ (otsuka-no-mi) ***Onyomi: おつび (otsubi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulsa ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Tỵ
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Snake== Years where the remainder when divided by 60 is 45 are Yin Wood Snake years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Snake Years''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[45]] *[[:en:105|105]] *[[:en:165|165]] *[[:en:225|225]] *[[:en:285|285]] *[[345]] *[[405]] *[[465]] *[[525]] *[[585]] *[[645]] *[[705]] *[[765]] *[[825]] *[[885]] *[[945]] | *[[:en:1005|1005]] *[[:en:1065|1065]] *[[:en:1125|1125]] *[[:en:1185|1185]] *[[:en:1245|1245]] *[[:en:1305|1305]] *[[:en:1365|1365]] *[[:en:1425|1425]] *[[:en:1485|1485]] *[[:en:1545|1545]] *[[:en:1605|1605]] *[[:en:1665|1665]] *[[:en:1725|1725]] *[[:en:1785|1785]] *[[:en:1845|1845]] *[[:en:1905|1905]] *[[:en:1965|1965]] | *[[:en:2025|2025]] *[[:en:2085|2085]] *[[:en:2145|2145]] *[[:en:2205|2205]] *[[:en:2265|2265]] *[[:en:2325|2325]] *[[:en:2385|2385]] *[[:en:2445|2445]] *[[2505]] *[[2565]] *[[2625]] *[[2685]] *[[2745]] *[[2805]] *[[2865]] *[[:en:2925|2925]] *[[:en:2985|2985]] |}
=== Events === * The downfall of the Soga clan by {{ill|Prince Naka no Ōe|ja|中大兄皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天智天皇}} and {{ill|Nakatomi no Kamatari|ja|中臣鎌足|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakatomi no Kamatari|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakatomi no Kamatari|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 藤原鎌足}} in [[645]] is known as the [[:en:Isshi incident|Isshi Incident]]. * The [[:en:Japan–Korea Treaty of 1905|Eulsa Treaty]] signed in [[:en:1905|1905]] is referred to as the '''Eulsa''' Protection Treaty in Korea.
==Months of Yin Wood Snake== April of years ending in 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}) corresponds to the Yin Wood Snake [[:en:Moon|Month]]. However, in the case of traditional calendars, the Yin Wood Snake month may be applied based on the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]).
==Days of Yin Wood Snake==
=== Special Calendar Notations === * Yin Wood Snake day is the 13th day of the {{ill|Tianyi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天一神}} cycle. == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] * [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]]

Generation]]) relationship (Wood generates Fire).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Wood Snake (乙巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 si6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-mi ***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-mi ***Onyomi 1: itsi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eulsa (을사) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Tỵ
<!-- == * Yin Wood Snake (乙巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 sei3 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのとみ (kinoto-mi) ***Onyomi: おつかのみ (otsuka-no-mi) ***Onyomi: おつび (otsubi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulsa ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Tỵ
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Snake== Years where the remainder when divided by 60 is 45 are Yin Wood Snake years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Snake Years''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]] |- | *[[45]] *[[:en:105|105]] *[[:en:165|165]] *[[:en:225|225]] *[[:en:285|285]] *[[:en:345|345]] *[[405]] *[[465]] *[[525]] *[[585]] *[[645]] *[[705]] *[[765]] *[[825]] *[[885]] *[[945]] | *[[:en:1005|1005]] *[[:en:1065|1065]] *[[:en:1125|1125]] *[[:en:1185|1185]] *[[:en:1245|1245]] *[[:en:1305|1305]] *[[:en:1365|1365]] *[[:en:1425|1425]] *[[:en:1485|1485]] *[[:en:1545|1545]] *[[:en:1605|1605]] *[[:en:1665|1665]] *[[:en:1725|1725]] *[[:en:1785|1785]] *[[:en:1845|1845]] *[[:en:1905|1905]] *[[:en:1965|1965]] | *[[:en:2025|2025]] *[[:en:2085|2085]] *[[:en:2145|2145]] *[[:en:2205|2205]] *[[:en:2265|2265]] *[[:en:2325|2325]] *[[:en:2385|2385]] *[[:en:2445|2445]] *[[2505]] *[[2565]] *[[2625]] *[[2685]] *[[2745]] *[[2805]] *[[2865]] *[[:en:2925|2925]] *[[:en:2985|2985]] |}
=== Events === * The downfall of the Soga clan by {{ill|Prince Naka no Ōe|ja|中大兄皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天智天皇}} and {{ill|Nakatomi no Kamatari|ja|中臣鎌足|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakatomi no Kamatari|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakatomi no Kamatari|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 藤原鎌足}} in [[645]] is known as the [[:en:Isshi incident|Isshi Incident]]. * The [[:en:Japan–Korea Treaty of 1905|Eulsa Treaty]] signed in [[:en:1905|1905]] is referred to as the '''Eulsa''' Protection Treaty in Korea.
==Months of Yin Wood Snake== April of years ending in 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}) corresponds to the Yin Wood Snake [[:en:Moon|Month]]. However, in the case of traditional calendars, the Yin Wood Snake month may be applied based on the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]).
==Days of Yin Wood Snake==
=== Special Calendar Notations === * Yin Wood Snake day is the 13th day of the {{ill|Tianyi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天一神}} cycle. == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] * [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]]

It is the 42nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, preceded by {{ill|Jiachen|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiachen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiachen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Bingwu|ja|1=Yang Fire Horse|2=ja|丙午|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Horse|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Generation]]) relationship (Wood generates Fire).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Wood Snake (乙巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 si6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-mi ***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-mi ***Onyomi 1: itsi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eulsa (을사) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Tỵ
<!-- == * Yin Wood Snake (乙巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 sei3 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのとみ (kinoto-mi) ***Onyomi: おつかのみ (otsuka-no-mi) ***Onyomi: おつび (otsubi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulsa ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Tỵ
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Snake== Years where the remainder when divided by 60 is 45 are Yin Wood Snake years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Snake Years''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | *[[45]] *[[:en:105|105]] *[[:en:165|165]] *[[:en:225|225]] *[[:en:285|285]] *[[:en:345|345]] *[[405]] *[[465]] *[[525]] *[[585]] *[[645]] *[[705]] *[[765]] *[[825]] *[[885]] *[[945]] | *[[:en:1005|1005]] *[[:en:1065|1065]] *[[:en:1125|1125]] *[[:en:1185|1185]] *[[:en:1245|1245]] *[[:en:1305|1305]] *[[:en:1365|1365]] *[[:en:1425|1425]] *[[:en:1485|1485]] *[[:en:1545|1545]] *[[:en:1605|1605]] *[[:en:1665|1665]] *[[:en:1725|1725]] *[[:en:1785|1785]] *[[:en:1845|1845]] *[[:en:1905|1905]] *[[:en:1965|1965]] | *[[:en:2025|2025]] *[[:en:2085|2085]] *[[:en:2145|2145]] *[[:en:2205|2205]] *[[:en:2265|2265]] *[[:en:2325|2325]] *[[:en:2385|2385]] *[[:en:2445|2445]] *[[2505]] *[[2565]] *[[2625]] *[[2685]] *[[2745]] *[[2805]] *[[2865]] *[[:en:2925|2925]] *[[:en:2985|2985]] |}
=== Events === * The downfall of the Soga clan by {{ill|Prince Naka no Ōe|ja|中大兄皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天智天皇}} and {{ill|Nakatomi no Kamatari|ja|中臣鎌足|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakatomi no Kamatari|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakatomi no Kamatari|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 藤原鎌足}} in [[645]] is known as the [[:en:Isshi incident|Isshi Incident]]. * The [[:en:Japan–Korea Treaty of 1905|Eulsa Treaty]] signed in [[:en:1905|1905]] is referred to as the '''Eulsa''' Protection Treaty in Korea.
==Months of Yin Wood Snake== April of years ending in 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}) corresponds to the Yin Wood Snake [[:en:Moon|Month]]. However, in the case of traditional calendars, the Yin Wood Snake month may be applied based on the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]).
==Days of Yin Wood Snake==
=== Special Calendar Notations === * Yin Wood Snake day is the 13th day of the {{ill|Tianyi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天一神}} cycle. == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] * [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]]

=== Events === * The downfall of the Soga clan by {{ill|Prince Naka no Ōe|ja|中大兄皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天智天皇}} and {{ill|Nakatomi no Kamatari|ja|中臣鎌足|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakatomi no Kamatari|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakatomi no Kamatari|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 藤原鎌足}} in [[645]] is known as the [[:en:Isshi incident|Isshi Incident]]. * The [[:en:Japan–Korea Treaty of 1905|Eulsa Treaty]] signed in [[:en:1905|1905]] is referred to as the '''Eulsa''' Protection Treaty in Korea.
==Months of Yin Wood Snake== April of years ending in 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}) corresponds to the Yin Wood Snake [[:en:Moon|Month]]. However, in the case of traditional calendars, the Yin Wood Snake month may be applied based on the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]).
==Days of Yin Wood Snake==
=== Special Calendar Notations === * Yin Wood Snake day is the 13th day of the {{ill|Tianyi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天一神}} cycle. == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] * [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]]

It is the 42nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, preceded by {{ill|Jiachen|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiachen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiachen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Bingwu|ja|1=Yang Fire Horse|2=ja|丙午|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Horse|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Generation]]) relationship (Wood generates Fire).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Wood Snake (乙巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 si6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-mi ***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-mi ***Onyomi 1: itsi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eulsa (을사) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Tỵ
<!-- == * Yin Wood Snake (乙巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 sei3 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのとみ (kinoto-mi) ***Onyomi: おつかのみ (otsuka-no-mi) ***Onyomi: おつび (otsubi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulsa ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Tỵ
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Snake== Years where the remainder when divided by 60 is 45 are Yin Wood Snake years.

==Months of Yin Wood Snake== April of years ending in 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}) corresponds to the Yin Wood Snake [[:en:Moon|Month]]. However, in the case of traditional calendars, the Yin Wood Snake month may be applied based on the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]).

It is the 42nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, preceded by {{ill|Jiachen|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiachen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiachen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Bingwu|ja|1=Yang Fire Horse|2=ja|丙午|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Horse|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Generation]]) relationship (Wood generates Fire).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Wood Snake (乙巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 si6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-mi ***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-mi ***Onyomi 1: itsi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eulsa (을사) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Tỵ
<!-- == * Yin Wood Snake (乙巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 sei3 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのとみ (kinoto-mi) ***Onyomi: おつかのみ (otsuka-no-mi) ***Onyomi: おつび (otsubi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulsa ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Tỵ
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Snake== Years where the remainder when divided by 60 is 45 are Yin Wood Snake years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Snake Years''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | *[[:en:45|45]] *[[:en:105|105]] *[[:en:165|165]] *[[:en:225|225]] *[[:en:285|285]] *[[:en:345|345]] *[[:en:405|405]] *[[:en:465|465]] *[[525]] *[[585]] *[[645]] *[[705]] *[[765]] *[[825]] *[[885]] *[[945]] | *[[:en:1005|1005]] *[[:en:1065|1065]] *[[:en:1125|1125]] *[[:en:1185|1185]] *[[:en:1245|1245]] *[[:en:1305|1305]] *[[:en:1365|1365]] *[[:en:1425|1425]] *[[:en:1485|1485]] *[[:en:1545|1545]] *[[:en:1605|1605]] *[[:en:1665|1665]] *[[:en:1725|1725]] *[[:en:1785|1785]] *[[:en:1845|1845]] *[[:en:1905|1905]] *[[:en:1965|1965]] | *[[:en:2025|2025]] *[[:en:2085|2085]] *[[:en:2145|2145]] *[[:en:2205|2205]] *[[:en:2265|2265]] *[[:en:2325|2325]] *[[:en:2385|2385]] *[[:en:2445|2445]] *[[2505]] *[[2565]] *[[2625]] *[[2685]] *[[2745]] *[[2805]] *[[2865]] *[[:en:2925|2925]] *[[:en:2985|2985]] |}
=== Events === * The downfall of the Soga clan by {{ill|Prince Naka no Ōe|ja|中大兄皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天智天皇}} and {{ill|Nakatomi no Kamatari|ja|中臣鎌足|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakatomi no Kamatari|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakatomi no Kamatari|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 藤原鎌足}} in [[645]] is known as the [[:en:Isshi incident|Isshi Incident]]. * The [[:en:Japan–Korea Treaty of 1905|Eulsa Treaty]] signed in [[:en:1905|1905]] is referred to as the '''Eulsa''' Protection Treaty in Korea.
==Months of Yin Wood Snake== April of years ending in 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}) corresponds to the Yin Wood Snake [[:en:Moon|Month]]. However, in the case of traditional calendars, the Yin Wood Snake month may be applied based on the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]).
==Days of Yin Wood Snake==
=== Special Calendar Notations === * Yin Wood Snake day is the 13th day of the {{ill|Tianyi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天一神}} cycle. == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] * [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]]

Generation]]) relationship (Wood generates Fire).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Wood Snake (乙巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 si6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-mi ***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-mi ***Onyomi 1: itsi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eulsa (을사) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Tỵ
<!-- == * Yin Wood Snake (乙巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 sei3 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのとみ (kinoto-mi) ***Onyomi: おつかのみ (otsuka-no-mi) ***Onyomi: おつび (otsubi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulsa ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Tỵ
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Snake== Years where the remainder when divided by 60 is 45 are Yin Wood Snake years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Snake Years''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | *[[:en:45|45]] *[[:en:105|105]] *[[:en:165|165]] *[[:en:225|225]] *[[:en:285|285]] *[[:en:345|345]] *[[:en:405|405]] *[[:en:465|465]] *[[:en:525|525]] *[[585]] *[[645]] *[[705]] *[[765]] *[[825]] *[[885]] *[[945]] | *[[:en:1005|1005]] *[[:en:1065|1065]] *[[:en:1125|1125]] *[[:en:1185|1185]] *[[:en:1245|1245]] *[[:en:1305|1305]] *[[:en:1365|1365]] *[[:en:1425|1425]] *[[:en:1485|1485]] *[[:en:1545|1545]] *[[:en:1605|1605]] *[[:en:1665|1665]] *[[:en:1725|1725]] *[[:en:1785|1785]] *[[:en:1845|1845]] *[[:en:1905|1905]] *[[:en:1965|1965]] | *[[:en:2025|2025]] *[[:en:2085|2085]] *[[:en:2145|2145]] *[[:en:2205|2205]] *[[:en:2265|2265]] *[[:en:2325|2325]] *[[:en:2385|2385]] *[[:en:2445|2445]] *[[2505]] *[[2565]] *[[2625]] *[[2685]] *[[2745]] *[[2805]] *[[2865]] *[[:en:2925|2925]] *[[:en:2985|2985]] |}
=== Events === * The downfall of the Soga clan by {{ill|Prince Naka no Ōe|ja|中大兄皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天智天皇}} and {{ill|Nakatomi no Kamatari|ja|中臣鎌足|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakatomi no Kamatari|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakatomi no Kamatari|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 藤原鎌足}} in [[645]] is known as the [[:en:Isshi incident|Isshi Incident]]. * The [[:en:Japan–Korea Treaty of 1905|Eulsa Treaty]] signed in [[:en:1905|1905]] is referred to as the '''Eulsa''' Protection Treaty in Korea.
==Months of Yin Wood Snake== April of years ending in 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}) corresponds to the Yin Wood Snake [[:en:Moon|Month]]. However, in the case of traditional calendars, the Yin Wood Snake month may be applied based on the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]).
==Days of Yin Wood Snake==
=== Special Calendar Notations === * Yin Wood Snake day is the 13th day of the {{ill|Tianyi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天一神}} cycle. == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] * [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]]

Generation]]) relationship (Wood generates Fire).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Wood Snake (乙巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 si6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-mi ***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-mi ***Onyomi 1: itsi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eulsa (을사) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Tỵ
<!-- == * Yin Wood Snake (乙巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 sei3 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのとみ (kinoto-mi) ***Onyomi: おつかのみ (otsuka-no-mi) ***Onyomi: おつび (otsubi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulsa ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Tỵ
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Snake== Years where the remainder when divided by 60 is 45 are Yin Wood Snake years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Snake Years''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | *[[:en:45|45]] *[[:en:105|105]] *[[:en:165|165]] *[[:en:225|225]] *[[:en:285|285]] *[[:en:345|345]] *[[:en:405|405]] *[[:en:465|465]] *[[:en:525|525]] *[[:en:585|585]] *[[645]] *[[705]] *[[765]] *[[825]] *[[885]] *[[945]] | *[[:en:1005|1005]] *[[:en:1065|1065]] *[[:en:1125|1125]] *[[:en:1185|1185]] *[[:en:1245|1245]] *[[:en:1305|1305]] *[[:en:1365|1365]] *[[:en:1425|1425]] *[[:en:1485|1485]] *[[:en:1545|1545]] *[[:en:1605|1605]] *[[:en:1665|1665]] *[[:en:1725|1725]] *[[:en:1785|1785]] *[[:en:1845|1845]] *[[:en:1905|1905]] *[[:en:1965|1965]] | *[[:en:2025|2025]] *[[:en:2085|2085]] *[[:en:2145|2145]] *[[:en:2205|2205]] *[[:en:2265|2265]] *[[:en:2325|2325]] *[[:en:2385|2385]] *[[:en:2445|2445]] *[[2505]] *[[2565]] *[[2625]] *[[2685]] *[[2745]] *[[2805]] *[[2865]] *[[:en:2925|2925]] *[[:en:2985|2985]] |}
=== Events === * The downfall of the Soga clan by {{ill|Prince Naka no Ōe|ja|中大兄皇子|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天智天皇}} and {{ill|Nakatomi no Kamatari|ja|中臣鎌足|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakatomi no Kamatari|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakatomi no Kamatari|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 藤原鎌足}} in [[645]] is known as the [[:en:Isshi incident|Isshi Incident]]. * The [[:en:Japan–Korea Treaty of 1905|Eulsa Treaty]] signed in [[:en:1905|1905]] is referred to as the '''Eulsa''' Protection Treaty in Korea.
==Months of Yin Wood Snake== April of years ending in 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}) corresponds to the Yin Wood Snake [[:en:Moon|Month]]. However, in the case of traditional calendars, the Yin Wood Snake month may be applied based on the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]).
==Days of Yin Wood Snake==
=== Special Calendar Notations === * Yin Wood Snake day is the 13th day of the {{ill|Tianyi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天一神}} cycle. == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] * [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]]
