generates Fire).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Wood Snake (乙巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 si6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-mi ***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-mi ***Onyomi 1: itsi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eulsa (을사) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Tỵ
<!-- == * Yin Wood Snake (乙巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 sei3 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのとみ (kinoto-mi) ***Onyomi: おつかのみ (otsuka-no-mi) ***Onyomi: おつび (otsubi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulsa ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Tỵ
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Snake== Years where the remainder when divided by 60 is 45 are Yin Wood Snake years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Snake Years''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | *[[:en:45|45]] *[[:en:105|105]] *[[:en:165|165]] *[[:en:225|225]] *[[:en:285|285]] *[[:en:345|345]] *[[:en:405|405]] *[[:en:465|465]] *[[:en:525|525]] *[[:en:585|585]] *[[:en:645|645]] *[[:en:705|705]] *[[:en:765|765]] *[[:en:825|825]] *[[:en:885|885]] *[[:en:945|945]] | *[[:en:1005|1005]] *[[:en:1065|1065]] *[[:en:1125|1125]] *[[:en:1185|1185]] *[[:en:1245|1245]] *[[:en:1305|1305]] *[[:en:1365|1365]] *[[:en:1425|1425]] *[[:en:1485|1485]] *[[:en:1545|1545]] *[[:en:1605|1605]] *[[:en:1665|1665]] *[[:en:1725|1725]] *[[:en:1785|1785]] *[[:en:1845|1845]] *[[:en:1905|1905]] *[[:en:1965|1965]] | *[[:en:2025|2025]] *[[:en:2085|2085]] *[[:en:2145|2145]] *[[:en:2205|2205]] *[[:en:2265|2265]] *[[:en:2325|2325]] *[[:en:2385|2385]] *[[:en:2445|2445]] *[[2505]] *[[2565]] *[[2625]] *[[2685]] *[[2745]] *[[2805]] *[[2865]] *[[:en:2925|2925]] *[[:en:2985|2985]] |}
=== Events === * The downfall of the Soga clan by {{ill|Prince Naka no Ōe|ja|中大兄皇子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天智天皇|1=Tenji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q314802}} and [[:en:Nakatomi no Kamatari|Nakatomi no Kamatari]] in [[:en:645|645]] is known as the [[:en:Isshi incident|Isshi Incident]]. * The [[:en:Japan–Korea Treaty of 1905|Eulsa Treaty]] signed in [[:en:1905|1905]] is referred to as the '''Eulsa''' Protection Treaty in Korea.
==Months of Yin Wood Snake== April of years ending in 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}) corresponds to the Yin Wood Snake [[:en:Moon|Month]]. However, in the case of traditional calendars, the Yin Wood Snake month may be applied based on the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]).
==Days of Yin Wood Snake==
=== Special Calendar Notations === * Yin Wood Snake day is the 13th day of the {{ill|Tianyi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle. == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] * [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]]

generates Fire).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Wood Snake (乙巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 si6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-mi ***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-mi ***Onyomi 1: itsi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eulsa (을사) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Tỵ
<!-- == * Yin Wood Snake (乙巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 sei3 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのとみ (kinoto-mi) ***Onyomi: おつかのみ (otsuka-no-mi) ***Onyomi: おつび (otsubi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulsa ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Tỵ
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Snake== Years where the remainder when divided by 60 is 45 are Yin Wood Snake years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Snake Years''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | *[[:en:45|45]] *[[:en:105|105]] *[[:en:165|165]] *[[:en:225|225]] *[[:en:285|285]] *[[:en:345|345]] *[[:en:405|405]] *[[:en:465|465]] *[[:en:525|525]] *[[:en:585|585]] *[[:en:645|645]] *[[:en:705|705]] *[[:en:765|765]] *[[:en:825|825]] *[[:en:885|885]] *[[:en:945|945]] | *[[:en:1005|1005]] *[[:en:1065|1065]] *[[:en:1125|1125]] *[[:en:1185|1185]] *[[:en:1245|1245]] *[[:en:1305|1305]] *[[:en:1365|1365]] *[[:en:1425|1425]] *[[:en:1485|1485]] *[[:en:1545|1545]] *[[:en:1605|1605]] *[[:en:1665|1665]] *[[:en:1725|1725]] *[[:en:1785|1785]] *[[:en:1845|1845]] *[[:en:1905|1905]] *[[:en:1965|1965]] | *[[:en:2025|2025]] *[[:en:2085|2085]] *[[:en:2145|2145]] *[[:en:2205|2205]] *[[:en:2265|2265]] *[[:en:2325|2325]] *[[:en:2385|2385]] *[[:en:2445|2445]] *[[2505]] *[[2565]] *[[2625]] *[[2685]] *[[2745]] *[[2805]] *[[2865]] *[[:en:2925|2925]] *[[:en:2985|2985]] |}
=== Events === * The downfall of the Soga clan by {{ill|Prince Naka no Ōe|ja|中大兄皇子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天智天皇|1=Tenji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q314802}} and [[:en:Nakatomi no Kamatari|Nakatomi no Kamatari]] in [[:en:645|645]] is known as the [[:en:Isshi incident|Isshi Incident]]. * The [[:en:Japan–Korea Treaty of 1905|Eulsa Treaty]] signed in [[:en:1905|1905]] is referred to as the '''Eulsa''' Protection Treaty in Korea.
==Months of Yin Wood Snake== April of years ending in 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}) corresponds to the Yin Wood Snake [[:en:Moon|Month]]. However, in the case of traditional calendars, the Yin Wood Snake month may be applied based on the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]).
==Days of Yin Wood Snake==
=== Special Calendar Notations === * Yin Wood Snake day is the 13th day of the {{ill|Tianyi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle. == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] * [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]]

It is the 42nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, preceded by {{ill|Jiachen|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiachen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiachen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Bingwu|ja|1=Yang Fire Horse|2=ja|丙午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] character {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, forming a generating ([[:en:Aioi|Mutual Generation]]) relationship (Wood generates Fire).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Wood Snake (乙巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 si6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-mi ***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-mi ***Onyomi 1: itsi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eulsa (을사) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Tỵ
<!-- == * Yin Wood Snake (乙巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 sei3 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのとみ (kinoto-mi) ***Onyomi: おつかのみ (otsuka-no-mi) ***Onyomi: おつび (otsubi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulsa ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Tỵ
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Snake== Years where the remainder when divided by 60 is 45 are Yin Wood Snake years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Snake Years''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | *[[:en:45|45]] *[[:en:105|105]] *[[:en:165|165]] *[[:en:225|225]] *[[:en:285|285]] *[[:en:345|345]] *[[:en:405|405]] *[[:en:465|465]] *[[:en:525|525]] *[[:en:585|585]] *[[:en:645|645]] *[[:en:705|705]] *[[:en:765|765]] *[[:en:825|825]] *[[:en:885|885]] *[[:en:945|945]] | *[[:en:1005|1005]] *[[:en:1065|1065]] *[[:en:1125|1125]] *[[:en:1185|1185]] *[[:en:1245|1245]] *[[:en:1305|1305]] *[[:en:1365|1365]] *[[:en:1425|1425]] *[[:en:1485|1485]] *[[:en:1545|1545]] *[[:en:1605|1605]] *[[:en:1665|1665]] *[[:en:1725|1725]] *[[:en:1785|1785]] *[[:en:1845|1845]] *[[:en:1905|1905]] *[[:en:1965|1965]] | *[[:en:2025|2025]] *[[:en:2085|2085]] *[[:en:2145|2145]] *[[:en:2205|2205]] *[[:en:2265|2265]] *[[:en:2325|2325]] *[[:en:2385|2385]] *[[:en:2445|2445]] *[[2505]] *[[2565]] *[[2625]] *[[2685]] *[[2745]] *[[2805]] *[[2865]] *[[:en:2925|2925]] *[[:en:2985|2985]] |}
=== Events === * The downfall of the Soga clan by {{ill|Prince Naka no Ōe|ja|中大兄皇子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天智天皇|1=Tenji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q314802}} and [[:en:Nakatomi no Kamatari|Nakatomi no Kamatari]] in [[:en:645|645]] is known as the [[:en:Isshi incident|Isshi Incident]]. * The [[:en:Japan–Korea Treaty of 1905|Eulsa Treaty]] signed in [[:en:1905|1905]] is referred to as the '''Eulsa''' Protection Treaty in Korea.
==Months of Yin Wood Snake== April of years ending in 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}) corresponds to the Yin Wood Snake [[:en:Moon|Month]]. However, in the case of traditional calendars, the Yin Wood Snake month may be applied based on the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]).
==Days of Yin Wood Snake==
=== Special Calendar Notations === * Yin Wood Snake day is the 13th day of the {{ill|Tianyi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle. == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] * [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]]

It is the 42nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, preceded by {{ill|Jiachen|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiachen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiachen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Bingwu|ja|1=Yang Fire Horse|2=ja|丙午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] character {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto However, in the case of traditional calendars, the Yin Wood Snake month may be applied based on the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]).

=== Special Calendar Notations === * Yin Wood Snake day is the 13th day of the {{ill|Tianyi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle. == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] * [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]]

It is the 42nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, preceded by {{ill|Jiachen|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiachen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiachen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Bingwu|ja|1=Yang Fire Horse|2=ja|丙午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] character {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}} represents yin generates Fire).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Wood Snake (乙巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 si6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-mi ***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-mi ***Onyomi 1: itsi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eulsa (을사) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Tỵ
<!-- == * Yin Wood Snake (乙巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 sei3 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのとみ (kinoto-mi) ***Onyomi: おつかのみ (otsuka-no-mi) ***Onyomi: おつび (otsubi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulsa ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Tỵ
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Snake== Years where the remainder when divided by 60 is 45 are Yin Wood Snake years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Snake Years''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | *[[:en:45|45]] *[[:en:105|105]] *[[:en:165|165]] *[[:en:225|225]] *[[:en:285|285]] *[[:en:345|345]] *[[:en:405|405]] *[[:en:465|465]] *[[:en:525|525]] *[[:en:585|585]] *[[:en:645|645]] *[[:en:705|705]] *[[:en:765|765]] *[[:en:825|825]] *[[:en:885|885]] *[[:en:945|945]] | *[[:en:1005|1005]] *[[:en:1065|1065]] *[[:en:1125|1125]] *[[:en:1185|1185]] *[[:en:1245|1245]] *[[:en:1305|1305]] *[[:en:1365|1365]] *[[:en:1425|1425]] *[[:en:1485|1485]] *[[:en:1545|1545]] *[[:en:1605|1605]] *[[:en:1665|1665]] *[[:en:1725|1725]] *[[:en:1785|1785]] *[[:en:1845|1845]] *[[:en:1905|1905]] *[[:en:1965|1965]] | *[[:en:2025|2025]] *[[:en:2085|2085]] *[[:en:2145|2145]] *[[:en:2205|2205]] *[[:en:2265|2265]] *[[:en:2325|2325]] *[[:en:2385|2385]] *[[:en:2445|2445]] *[[2505]] *[[2565]] *[[2625]] *[[2685]] *[[2745]] *[[2805]] *[[2865]] *[[:en:2925|2925]] *[[:en:2985|2985]] |}
=== Events === * The downfall of the Soga clan by {{ill|Prince Naka no Ōe|ja|中大兄皇子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天智天皇|1=Tenji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q314802}} and [[:en:Nakatomi no Kamatari|Nakatomi no Kamatari]] in [[:en:645|645]] is known as the [[:en:Isshi incident|Isshi Incident]]. * The [[:en:Japan–Korea Treaty of 1905|Eulsa Treaty]] signed in [[:en:1905|1905]] is referred to as the '''Eulsa''' Protection Treaty in Korea.
==Months of Yin Wood Snake== April of years ending in 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}) corresponds to the Yin Wood Snake [[:en:Moon|Month]]. However, in the case of traditional calendars, the Yin Wood Snake month may be applied based on the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]).
==Days of Yin Wood Snake==
=== Special Calendar Notations === * Yin Wood Snake day is the 13th day of the {{ill|Tianyi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle. == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] * [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]]

It is the 42nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, preceded by {{ill|Jiachen|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiachen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiachen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Bingwu|ja|1=Yang Fire Horse|2=ja|丙午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] character {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}} represents yin generates Fire).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Wood Snake (乙巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 si6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-mi ***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-mi ***Onyomi 1: itsi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eulsa (을사) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Tỵ
<!-- == * Yin Wood Snake (乙巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 sei3 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのとみ (kinoto-mi) ***Onyomi: おつかのみ (otsuka-no-mi) ***Onyomi: おつび (otsubi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulsa ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Tỵ
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Snake== Years where the remainder when divided by 60 is 45 are Yin Wood Snake years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Snake Years''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | *[[:en:45|45]] *[[:en:105|105]] *[[:en:165|165]] *[[:en:225|225]] *[[:en:285|285]] *[[:en:345|345]] *[[:en:405|405]] *[[:en:465|465]] *[[:en:525|525]] *[[:en:585|585]] *[[:en:645|645]] *[[:en:705|705]] *[[:en:765|765]] *[[:en:825|825]] *[[:en:885|885]] *[[:en:945|945]] | *[[:en:1005|1005]] *[[:en:1065|1065]] *[[:en:1125|1125]] *[[:en:1185|1185]] *[[:en:1245|1245]] *[[:en:1305|1305]] *[[:en:1365|1365]] *[[:en:1425|1425]] *[[:en:1485|1485]] *[[:en:1545|1545]] *[[:en:1605|1605]] *[[:en:1665|1665]] *[[:en:1725|1725]] *[[:en:1785|1785]] *[[:en:1845|1845]] *[[:en:1905|1905]] *[[:en:1965|1965]] | *[[:en:2025|2025]] *[[:en:2085|2085]] *[[:en:2145|2145]] *[[:en:2205|2205]] *[[:en:2265|2265]] *[[:en:2325|2325]] *[[:en:2385|2385]] *[[:en:2445|2445]] *[[2505]] *[[2565]] *[[2625]] *[[2685]] *[[2745]] *[[2805]] *[[2865]] *[[:en:2925|2925]] *[[:en:2985|2985]] |}
=== Events === * The downfall of the Soga clan by {{ill|Prince Naka no Ōe|ja|中大兄皇子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天智天皇|1=Tenji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q314802}} and [[:en:Nakatomi no Kamatari|Nakatomi no Kamatari]] in [[:en:645|645]] is known as the [[:en:Isshi incident|Isshi Incident]]. * The [[:en:Japan–Korea Treaty of 1905|Eulsa Treaty]] signed in [[:en:1905|1905]] is referred to as the '''Eulsa''' Protection Treaty in Korea.
==Months of Yin Wood Snake== April of years ending in 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}) corresponds to the Yin Wood Snake [[:en:Moon|Month]]. However, in the case of traditional calendars, the Yin Wood Snake month may be applied based on the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]).
==Days of Yin Wood Snake==
=== Special Calendar Notations === * Yin Wood Snake day is the 13th day of the {{ill|Tianyi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle. == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] * [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]]

generates Fire).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Wood Snake (乙巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 si6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-mi ***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-mi ***Onyomi 1: itsi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eulsa (을사) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Tỵ
<!-- == * Yin Wood Snake (乙巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 sei3 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのとみ (kinoto-mi) ***Onyomi: おつかのみ (otsuka-no-mi) ***Onyomi: おつび (otsubi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulsa ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Tỵ
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Snake== Years where the remainder when divided by 60 is 45 are Yin Wood Snake years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Snake Years''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | *[[:en:45|45]] *[[:en:105|105]] *[[:en:165|165]] *[[:en:225|225]] *[[:en:285|285]] *[[:en:345|345]] *[[:en:405|405]] *[[:en:465|465]] *[[:en:525|525]] *[[:en:585|585]] *[[:en:645|645]] *[[:en:705|705]] *[[:en:765|765]] *[[:en:825|825]] *[[:en:885|885]] *[[:en:945|945]] | *[[:en:1005|1005]] *[[:en:1065|1065]] *[[:en:1125|1125]] *[[:en:1185|1185]] *[[:en:1245|1245]] *[[:en:1305|1305]] *[[:en:1365|1365]] *[[:en:1425|1425]] *[[:en:1485|1485]] *[[:en:1545|1545]] *[[:en:1605|1605]] *[[:en:1665|1665]] *[[:en:1725|1725]] *[[:en:1785|1785]] *[[:en:1845|1845]] *[[:en:1905|1905]] *[[:en:1965|1965]] | *[[:en:2025|2025]] *[[:en:2085|2085]] *[[:en:2145|2145]] *[[:en:2205|2205]] *[[:en:2265|2265]] *[[:en:2325|2325]] *[[:en:2385|2385]] *[[:en:2445|2445]] *[[2505]] *[[2565]] *[[2625]] *[[2685]] *[[2745]] *[[2805]] *[[2865]] *[[:en:2925|2925]] *[[:en:2985|2985]] |}
=== Events === * The downfall of the Soga clan by {{ill|Prince Naka no Ōe|ja|中大兄皇子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天智天皇|1=Tenji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q314802}} and [[:en:Nakatomi no Kamatari|Nakatomi no Kamatari]] in [[:en:645|645]] is known as the [[:en:Isshi incident|Isshi Incident]]. * The [[:en:Japan–Korea Treaty of 1905|Eulsa Treaty]] signed in [[:en:1905|1905]] is referred to as the '''Eulsa''' Protection Treaty in Korea.
==Months of Yin Wood Snake== April of years ending in 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}) corresponds to the Yin Wood Snake [[:en:Moon|Month]]. However, in the case of traditional calendars, the Yin Wood Snake month may be applied based on the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]).
==Days of Yin Wood Snake==
=== Special Calendar Notations === * Yin Wood Snake day is the 13th day of the {{ill|Tianyi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle. == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] * [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Houtslang (astrologie)]][[cdo:Ĭk-sê̤ṳ]][[de:Holz-Schlange]][[fr:Serpent de bois]][[hak:Yet-sṳ]][[ja:乙巳]][[ko:을사]][[vi:Ất Tỵ]][[za:Ietceih]][[zh_min_nan:It-sū]][[zh_yue:乙巳]][[zh:乙巳]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Houtslang (astrologie)]][[cdo:Ĭk-sê̤ṳ]][[de:Holz-Schlange]][[fr:Serpent de bois]][[hak:Yet-sṳ]][[ja:乙巳]][[ko:을사]][[vi:Ất Tỵ]][[za:Ietceih]][[zh_min_nan:It-sū]][[zh_yue:乙巳]][[zh:乙巳]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Houtslang (astrologie)]][[cdo:Ĭk-sê̤ṳ]][[de:Holz-Schlange]][[fr:Serpent de bois]][[hak:Yet-sṳ]][[ja:乙巳]][[ko:을사]][[vi:Ất Tỵ]][[za:Ietceih]][[zh-min-nan:It-sū]][[zh-yue:乙巳]][[zh:乙巳]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q905031]] Wikidata name: Yin Wood Snake [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:32, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Snake|kanji=乙巳|romaji=kinoto mi|onyomi=otsushi|p=yǐsì|w=i-ssu|mi=i²¹ sɨ|y=jyut6 si6|j=jyut6 si6|ci=jyt̚ siː|mc=ʔit si|oc-bs=Ɂik si|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} '''Yin Wood Snake also known as Yin Wood Snake''' (乙巳, Kinoto-Mi, Otsuboku-no-Mi, Isshi) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 42nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, preceded by {{ill|Jiachen|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiachen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiachen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Bingwu|ja|1=Yang Fire Horse|2=ja|丙午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] character {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}} represents yin generates Fire).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Wood Snake (乙巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 si6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-mi ***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-mi ***Onyomi 1: itsi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eulsa (을사) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Tỵ
<!-- == * Yin Wood Snake (乙巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 sei3 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのとみ (kinoto-mi) ***Onyomi: おつかのみ (otsuka-no-mi) ***Onyomi: おつび (otsubi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulsa ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Tỵ
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Snake== Years where the remainder when divided by 60 is 45 are Yin Wood Snake years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Snake Years''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | *[[:en:45|45]] *[[:en:105|105]] *[[:en:165|165]] *[[:en:225|225]] *[[:en:285|285]] *[[:en:345|345]] *[[:en:405|405]] *[[:en:465|465]] *[[:en:525|525]] *[[:en:585|585]] *[[:en:645|645]] *[[:en:705|705]] *[[:en:765|765]] *[[:en:825|825]] *[[:en:885|885]] *[[:en:945|945]] | *[[:en:1005|1005]] *[[:en:1065|1065]] *[[:en:1125|1125]] *[[:en:1185|1185]] *[[:en:1245|1245]] *[[:en:1305|1305]] *[[:en:1365|1365]] *[[:en:1425|1425]] *[[:en:1485|1485]] *[[:en:1545|1545]] *[[:en:1605|1605]] *[[:en:1665|1665]] *[[:en:1725|1725]] *[[:en:1785|1785]] *[[:en:1845|1845]] *[[:en:1905|1905]] *[[:en:1965|1965]] | *[[:en:2025|2025]] *[[:en:2085|2085]] *[[:en:2145|2145]] *[[:en:2205|2205]] *[[:en:2265|2265]] *[[:en:2325|2325]] *[[:en:2385|2385]] *[[:en:2445|2445]] *[[2505]] *[[2565]] *[[2625]] *[[2685]] *[[2745]] *[[2805]] *[[2865]] *[[:en:2925|2925]] *[[:en:2985|2985]] |}
=== Events === * The downfall of the Soga clan by {{ill|Prince Naka no Ōe|ja|中大兄皇子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天智天皇|1=Tenji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q314802}} and [[:en:Nakatomi no Kamatari|Nakatomi no Kamatari]] in [[:en:645|645]] is known as the [[:en:Isshi incident|Isshi Incident]]. * The [[:en:Japan–Korea Treaty of 1905|Eulsa Treaty]] signed in [[:en:1905|1905]] is referred to as the '''Eulsa''' Protection Treaty in Korea.
==Months of Yin Wood Snake== April of years ending in 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}) corresponds to the Yin Wood Snake [[:en:Moon|Month]]. However, in the case of traditional calendars, the Yin Wood Snake month may be applied based on the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]).
==Days of Yin Wood Snake==
=== Special Calendar Notations === * Yin Wood Snake day is the 13th day of the {{ill|Tianyi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle. == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] * [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]]

It is the 42nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, preceded by {{ill|Jiachen|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiachen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiachen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Bingwu|ja|1=Yang Fire Horse|2=ja|丙午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] character {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}} represents yin === Events === * The downfall of the Soga clan by {{ill|Prince Naka no Ōe|ja|中大兄皇子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天智天皇|1=Tenji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q314802}} and [[:en:Nakatomi no Kamatari|Nakatomi no Kamatari]] in [[:en:645|645]] is known as the [[:en:Isshi incident|Isshi Incident]]. * The [[:en:Japan–Korea Treaty of 1905|Eulsa Treaty]] signed in [[:en:1905|1905]] is referred to as the '''Eulsa''' Protection Treaty in Korea.
==Months of Yin Wood Snake== April of years ending in 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}) corresponds to the Yin Wood Snake [[:en:Moon|Month]]. However, in the case of traditional calendars, the Yin Wood Snake month may be applied based on the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]).
==Days of Yin Wood Snake==
=== Special Calendar Notations === * Yin Wood Snake day is the 13th day of the {{ill|Tianyi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle. == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] * [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]]

It is the 42nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, preceded by {{ill|Jiachen|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiachen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiachen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Bingwu|ja|1=Yang Fire Horse|2=ja|丙午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] character {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}} represents yin ==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Wood Snake (乙巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 si6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-mi ***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-mi ***Onyomi 1: itsi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eulsa (을사) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Tỵ

==Months of Yin Wood Snake== April of years ending in 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}) corresponds to the Yin Wood Snake [[:en:Moon|Month]]. However, in the case of traditional calendars, the Yin Wood Snake month may be applied based on the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]).

generates Fire).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Wood Snake (乙巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 si6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-mi ***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-mi ***Onyomi 1: itsi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eulsa (을사) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Tỵ
<!-- == * Yin Wood Snake (乙巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 sei3 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのとみ (kinoto-mi) ***Onyomi: おつかのみ (otsuka-no-mi) ***Onyomi: おつび (otsubi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulsa ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Tỵ
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Snake== Years where the remainder when divided by 60 is 45 are Yin Wood Snake years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Snake Years''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | *[[:en:45|45]] *[[:en:105|105]] *[[:en:165|165]] *[[:en:225|225]] *[[:en:285|285]] *[[:en:345|345]] *[[:en:405|405]] *[[:en:465|465]] *[[:en:525|525]] *[[:en:585|585]] *[[:en:645|645]] *[[:en:705|705]] *[[:en:765|765]] *[[:en:825|825]] *[[:en:885|885]] *[[:en:945|945]] | *[[:en:1005|1005]] *[[:en:1065|1065]] *[[:en:1125|1125]] *[[:en:1185|1185]] *[[:en:1245|1245]] *[[:en:1305|1305]] *[[:en:1365|1365]] *[[:en:1425|1425]] *[[:en:1485|1485]] *[[:en:1545|1545]] *[[:en:1605|1605]] *[[:en:1665|1665]] *[[:en:1725|1725]] *[[:en:1785|1785]] *[[:en:1845|1845]] *[[:en:1905|1905]] *[[:en:1965|1965]] | *[[:en:2025|2025]] *[[:en:2085|2085]] *[[:en:2145|2145]] *[[:en:2205|2205]] *[[:en:2265|2265]] *[[:en:2325|2325]] *[[:en:2385|2385]] *[[:en:2445|2445]] *[[2505]] *[[2565]] *[[2625]] *[[2685]] *[[2745]] *[[2805]] *[[2865]] *[[:en:2925|2925]] *[[:en:2985|2985]] |}
=== Events === * The downfall of the Soga clan by {{ill|Prince Naka no Ōe|ja|中大兄皇子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天智天皇|1=Tenji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q314802}} and [[:en:Nakatomi no Kamatari|Nakatomi no Kamatari]] in [[:en:645|645]] is known as the [[:en:Isshi incident|Isshi Incident]]. * The [[:en:Japan–Korea Treaty of 1905|Eulsa Treaty]] signed in [[:en:1905|1905]] is referred to as the '''Eulsa''' Protection Treaty in Korea.
==Months of Yin Wood Snake== April of years ending in 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}) corresponds to the Yin Wood Snake [[:en:Moon|Month]]. However, in the case of traditional calendars, the Yin Wood Snake month may be applied based on the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]).
==Days of Yin Wood Snake==
=== Special Calendar Notations === * Yin Wood Snake day is the 13th day of the {{ill|Tianyi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle. == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] * [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]]

generates Fire).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Wood Snake (乙巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 si6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-mi ***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-mi ***Onyomi 1: itsi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eulsa (을사) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Tỵ
<!-- == * Yin Wood Snake (乙巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 sei3 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのとみ (kinoto-mi) ***Onyomi: おつかのみ (otsuka-no-mi) ***Onyomi: おつび (otsubi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulsa ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Tỵ
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Snake== Years where the remainder when divided by 60 is 45 are Yin Wood Snake years.
{| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Snake Years''' |- ![[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]]!![[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]]!![[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | *[[:en:45|45]] *[[:en:105|105]] *[[:en:165|165]] *[[:en:225|225]] *[[:en:285|285]] *[[:en:345|345]] *[[:en:405|405]] *[[:en:465|465]] *[[:en:525|525]] *[[:en:585|585]] *[[:en:645|645]] *[[:en:705|705]] *[[:en:765|765]] *[[:en:825|825]] *[[:en:885|885]] *[[:en:945|945]] | *[[:en:1005|1005]] *[[:en:1065|1065]] *[[:en:1125|1125]] *[[:en:1185|1185]] *[[:en:1245|1245]] *[[:en:1305|1305]] *[[:en:1365|1365]] *[[:en:1425|1425]] *[[:en:1485|1485]] *[[:en:1545|1545]] *[[:en:1605|1605]] *[[:en:1665|1665]] *[[:en:1725|1725]] *[[:en:1785|1785]] *[[:en:1845|1845]] *[[:en:1905|1905]] *[[:en:1965|1965]] | *[[:en:2025|2025]] *[[:en:2085|2085]] *[[:en:2145|2145]] *[[:en:2205|2205]] *[[:en:2265|2265]] *[[:en:2325|2325]] *[[:en:2385|2385]] *[[:en:2445|2445]] *[[2505]] *[[2565]] *[[2625]] *[[2685]] *[[2745]] *[[2805]] *[[2865]] *[[:en:2925|2925]] *[[:en:2985|2985]] |}
=== Events === * The downfall of the Soga clan by {{ill|Prince Naka no Ōe|ja|中大兄皇子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天智天皇|1=Tenji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q314802}} and [[:en:Nakatomi no Kamatari|Nakatomi no Kamatari]] in [[:en:645|645]] is known as the [[:en:Isshi incident|Isshi Incident]]. * The [[:en:Japan–Korea Treaty of 1905|Eulsa Treaty]] signed in [[:en:1905|1905]] is referred to as the '''Eulsa''' Protection Treaty in Korea.
==Months of Yin Wood Snake== April of years ending in 2 or 7 (where the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}) corresponds to the Yin Wood Snake [[:en:Moon|Month]]. However, in the case of traditional calendars, the Yin Wood Snake month may be applied based on the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]).
==Days of Yin Wood Snake==
=== Special Calendar Notations === * Yin Wood Snake day is the 13th day of the {{ill|Tianyi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle. == See Also == * {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] * [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Snake|kanji=乙巳|romaji=kinoto mi|onyomi=otsushi|p=yǐsì|w=i-ssu|mi=i²¹ sɨ|y=jyut6 si6|j=jyut6 si6|ci=jyt̚ siː|mc=ʔit si|oc-bs=Ɂik si|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Wood Snake also known as  Yin Wood Snake''' (乙巳, Kinoto-Mi, Otsuboku-no-Mi, Isshi) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

It is the 42nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, preceded by {{ill|Jiachen|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiachen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiachen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Bingwu|ja|1=Yang Fire Horse|2=ja|丙午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} character {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் ==Pronunciation==

** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐsì
** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 si6
**  Japanese:

***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-mi
***Onyomi 1: itsi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eulsa (을사)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Tỵ

=== Events ===
* The downfall of the Soga clan by {{ill|Prince Naka no Ōe|ja|中大兄皇子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天智天皇|1=Tenji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q314802}} and [[:en:Nakatomi no Kamatari|Nakatomi no Kamatari]] in {{ill|645|en|645|WD=Q31040|lt=645}} is known as the {{ill|Isshi incident|en|Isshi incident|WD=Q1062771|lt=Isshi Incident}}.
* The {{ill|Japan–Korea Treaty of 1905|en|Japan–Korea Treaty of 1905|WD=Q233254|lt=Eulsa Treaty}} signed in {{ill|1905|en|1905|WD=Q2047|lt=1905}} is referred to as the '''Eulsa''' Protection Treaty in Korea.

==Months of Yin Wood Snake==
April of years ending in 2 or 7 (where the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}) corresponds to the Yin Wood Snake {{ill|Moon|en|Moon|WD=Q405|lt=Month}}. However, in the case of traditional calendars, the Yin Wood Snake month may be applied based on the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lixia|en|Lixia|WD=Q1191007|lt=Lixia}} to the day before {{ill|Mangzhong|en|Mangzhong|WD=Q1147880|lt=Mangzhong}}).

==Days of Yin Wood Snake==

=== Special Calendar Notations ===
* Yin Wood Snake day is the 13th day of the {{ill|Tianyi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Wood Snake also known as  Yin Wood Snake''' (乙巳, Kinoto-Mi, Otsuboku-no-Mi, Isshi) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

It is the 42nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, preceded by {{ill|Jiachen|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiachen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiachen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Bingwu|ja|1=Yang Fire Horse|2=ja|丙午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} character {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu === Events ===
* The downfall of the Soga clan by {{ill|Prince Naka no Ōe|ja|中大兄皇子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天智天皇|1=Tenji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q314802}} and [[:en:Nakatomi no Kamatari|Nakatomi no Kamatari]] in {{ill|645|en|645|WD=Q31040|lt=645}} is known as the {{ill|Isshi incident|en|Isshi incident|WD=Q1062771|lt=Isshi Incident}}.
* The {{ill|Japan–Korea Treaty of 1905|en|Japan–Korea Treaty of 1905|WD=Q233254|lt=Eulsa Treaty}} signed in {{ill|1905|en|1905|WD=Q2047|lt=1905}} is referred to as the '''Eulsa''' Protection Treaty in Korea.

==Months of Yin Wood Snake==
April of years ending in 2 or 7 (where the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}) corresponds to the Yin Wood Snake {{ill|Moon|en|Moon|WD=Q405|lt=Month}}. However, in the case of traditional calendars, the Yin Wood Snake month may be applied based on the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lixia|en|Lixia|WD=Q1191007|lt=Lixia}} to the day before {{ill|Mangzhong|en|Mangzhong|WD=Q1147880|lt=Mangzhong}}).

==Days of Yin Wood Snake==

=== Special Calendar Notations ===
* Yin Wood Snake day is the 13th day of the {{ill|Tianyi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Wood Snake also known as  Yin Wood Snake''' (乙巳, Kinoto-Mi, Otsuboku-no-Mi, Isshi) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

It is the 42nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, preceded by {{ill|Jiachen|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiachen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiachen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Bingwu|ja|1=Yang Fire Horse|2=ja|丙午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} character {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu ==Years of Yin Wood Snake==

=== Events ===
* The downfall of the Soga clan by {{ill|Prince Naka no Ōe|ja|中大兄皇子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天智天皇|1=Tenji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q314802}} and [[:en:Nakatomi no Kamatari|Nakatomi no Kamatari]] in {{ill|645|en|645|WD=Q31040|lt=645}} is known as the {{ill|Isshi incident|en|Isshi incident|WD=Q1062771|lt=Isshi Incident}}.
* The {{ill|Japan–Korea Treaty of 1905|en|Japan–Korea Treaty of 1905|WD=Q233254|lt=Eulsa Treaty}} signed in {{ill|1905|en|1905|WD=Q2047|lt=1905}} is referred to as the '''Eulsa''' Protection Treaty in Korea.

==Months of Yin Wood Snake==
April of years ending in 2 or 7 (where the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}) corresponds to the Yin Wood Snake {{ill|Moon|en|Moon|WD=Q405|lt=Month}}. However, in the case of traditional calendars, the Yin Wood Snake month may be applied based on the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lixia|en|Lixia|WD=Q1191007|lt=Lixia}} to the day before {{ill|Mangzhong|en|Mangzhong|WD=Q1147880|lt=Mangzhong}}).

==Days of Yin Wood Snake==

=== Special Calendar Notations ===
* Yin Wood Snake day is the 13th day of the {{ill|Tianyi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Snake|kanji=乙巳|romaji=kinoto mi|onyomi=otsushi|p=yǐsì|w=i-ssu|mi=i²¹ sɨ|y=jyut6 si6|j=jyut6 si6|ci=jyt̚ siː|mc=ʔit si|oc-bs=Ɂik si|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Wood Snake also known as  Yin Wood Snake''' (乙巳, Kinoto-Mi, Otsuboku-no-Mi, Isshi) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

It is the 42nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, preceded by {{ill|Jiachen|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiachen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiachen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Bingwu|ja|1=Yang Fire Horse|2=ja|丙午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} character {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu ==Pronunciation==

** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐsì
** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 si6
**  Japanese:

***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-mi
***Onyomi 1: itsi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eulsa (을사)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Tỵ

=== Events ===
* The downfall of the Soga clan by {{ill|Prince Naka no Ōe|ja|中大兄皇子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天智天皇|1=Tenji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q314802}} and [[:en:Nakatomi no Kamatari|Nakatomi no Kamatari]] in {{ill|645|en|645|WD=Q31040|lt=645}} is known as the {{ill|Isshi incident|en|Isshi incident|WD=Q1062771|lt=Isshi Incident}}.
* The {{ill|Japan–Korea Treaty of 1905|en|Japan–Korea Treaty of 1905|WD=Q233254|lt=Eulsa Treaty}} signed in {{ill|1905|en|1905|WD=Q2047|lt=1905}} is referred to as the '''Eulsa''' Protection Treaty in Korea.

==Months of Yin Wood Snake==
April of years ending in 2 or 7 (where the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}) corresponds to the Yin Wood Snake {{ill|Moon|en|Moon|WD=Q405|lt=Month}}. However, in the case of traditional calendars, the Yin Wood Snake month may be applied based on the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lixia|en|Lixia|WD=Q1191007|lt=Lixia}} to the day before {{ill|Mangzhong|en|Mangzhong|WD=Q1147880|lt=Mangzhong}}).

==Days of Yin Wood Snake==

=== Special Calendar Notations ===
* Yin Wood Snake day is the 13th day of the {{ill|Tianyi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Wood Snake also known as  Yin Wood Snake''' (乙巳, Kinoto-Mi, Otsuboku-no-Mi, Isshi) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

It is the 42nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, preceded by {{ill|Jiachen|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiachen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiachen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Bingwu|ja|1=Yang Fire Horse|2=ja|丙午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} character {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu ==Pronunciation==

** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐsì
** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 si6
**  Japanese:

***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-mi
***Onyomi 1: itsi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eulsa (을사)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Tỵ

=== Events ===
* The downfall of the Soga clan by {{ill|Prince Naka no Ōe|ja|中大兄皇子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天智天皇|1=Tenji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q314802}} and [[:en:Nakatomi no Kamatari|Nakatomi no Kamatari]] in {{ill|645|en|645|WD=Q31040|lt=645}} is known as the {{ill|Isshi incident|en|Isshi incident|WD=Q1062771|lt=Isshi Incident}}.
* The {{ill|Japan–Korea Treaty of 1905|en|Japan–Korea Treaty of 1905|WD=Q233254|lt=Eulsa Treaty}} signed in {{ill|1905|en|1905|WD=Q2047|lt=1905}} is referred to as the '''Eulsa''' Protection Treaty in Korea.

==Months of Yin Wood Snake==
April of years ending in 2 or 7 (where the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}) corresponds to the Yin Wood Snake {{ill|Moon|en|Moon|WD=Q405|lt=Month}}. However, in the case of traditional calendars, the Yin Wood Snake month may be applied based on the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lixia|en|Lixia|WD=Q1191007|lt=Lixia}} to the day before {{ill|Mangzhong|en|Mangzhong|WD=Q1147880|lt=Mangzhong}}).

==Days of Yin Wood Snake==

=== Special Calendar Notations ===
* Yin Wood Snake day is the 13th day of the {{ill|Tianyi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Wood Snake also known as  Yin Wood Snake''' (乙巳, Kinoto-Mi, Otsuboku-no-Mi, Isshi) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

It is the 42nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, preceded by {{ill|Jiachen|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiachen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiachen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Bingwu|ja|1=Yang Fire Horse|2=ja|丙午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} character {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu ==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Wood Snake (乙巳)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐsì
** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 si6
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-mi
***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-mi
***Onyomi 1: itsi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eulsa (을사)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Tỵ

=== Events ===
* The downfall of the Soga clan by {{ill|Prince Naka no Ōe|ja|中大兄皇子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天智天皇|1=Emperor Tenji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q314802}} and [[:en:Nakatomi no Kamatari|Nakatomi no Kamatari]] in {{ill|645|en|645|WD=Q31040|lt=645|1=645}} is known as the {{ill|Isshi incident|en|Isshi incident|WD=Q1062771|lt=Isshi Incident|1=Isshi incident}}.
* The {{ill|Japan–Korea Treaty of 1905|en|Japan–Korea Treaty of 1905|WD=Q233254|lt=Eulsa Treaty|1=Japan–Korea Treaty of 1905}} signed in {{ill|1905|en|1905|WD=Q2047|lt=1905|1=1905}} is referred to as the '''Eulsa''' Protection Treaty in Korea.

==Months of Yin Wood Snake==
April of years ending in 2 or 7 (where the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}) corresponds to the Yin Wood Snake {{ill|Moon|en|Moon|WD=Q405|lt=Month|1=Moon}}. However, in the case of traditional calendars, the Yin Wood Snake month may be applied based on the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lixia|en|Lixia|WD=Q1191007|lt=Lixia|1=Lixia}} to the day before {{ill|Mangzhong|en|Mangzhong|WD=Q1147880|lt=Mangzhong|1=Mangzhong}}).

==Days of Yin Wood Snake==

=== Special Calendar Notations ===
* Yin Wood Snake day is the 13th day of the {{ill|Tianyi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Snake|kanji=乙巳|romaji=kinoto mi|onyomi=otsushi|p=yǐsì|w=i-ssu|mi=i²¹ sɨ|y=jyut6 si6|j=jyut6 si6|ci=jyt̚ siː|mc=ʔit si|oc-bs=Ɂik si|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Wood Snake also known as  Yin Wood Snake''' (乙巳, Kinoto-Mi, Otsuboku-no-Mi, Isshi) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

It is the 42nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, preceded by {{ill|Jiachen|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiachen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiachen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Bingwu|ja|1=Yang Fire Horse|2=ja|丙午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} character {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் ==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Wood Snake (乙巳)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐsì
** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 si6
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-mi
***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-mi
***Onyomi 1: itsi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eulsa (을사)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Tỵ

=== Events ===
* The downfall of the Soga clan by {{ill|Prince Naka no Ōe|ja|中大兄皇子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天智天皇|1=Emperor Tenji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q314802}} and [[:en:Nakatomi no Kamatari|Nakatomi no Kamatari]] in {{ill|645|en|645|WD=Q31040|lt=645|1=645}} is known as the {{ill|Isshi incident|en|Isshi incident|WD=Q1062771|lt=Isshi Incident|1=Isshi incident}}.
* The {{ill|Japan–Korea Treaty of 1905|en|Japan–Korea Treaty of 1905|WD=Q233254|lt=Eulsa Treaty|1=Japan–Korea Treaty of 1905}} signed in {{ill|1905|en|1905|WD=Q2047|lt=1905|1=1905}} is referred to as the '''Eulsa''' Protection Treaty in Korea.

==Months of Yin Wood Snake==
April of years ending in 2 or 7 (where the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}) corresponds to the Yin Wood Snake {{ill|Moon|en|Moon|WD=Q405|lt=Month|1=Moon}}. However, in the case of traditional calendars, the Yin Wood Snake month may be applied based on the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lixia|en|Lixia|WD=Q1191007|lt=Lixia|1=Lixia}} to the day before {{ill|Mangzhong|en|Mangzhong|WD=Q1147880|lt=Mangzhong|1=Mangzhong}}).

==Days of Yin Wood Snake==

=== Special Calendar Notations ===
* Yin Wood Snake day is the 13th day of the {{ill|Tianyi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.
