{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Snake|kanji=乙巳|romaji=kinoto mi|onyomi=otsushi|p=yǐsì|w=i-ssu|mi=i²¹ sɨ|y=jyut6 si6|j=jyut6 si6|ci=jyt̚ siː|mc=ʔit si|oc-bs=Ɂik si|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Wood Snake also known as  Yin Wood Snake''' (乙巳, Kinoto-Mi, Otsuboku-no-Mi, Isshi) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

It is the 42nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, preceded by {{ill|Jiachen|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiachen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiachen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Bingwu|ja|1=Yang Fire Horse|2=ja|丙午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} character {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் ==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Wood Snake (乙巳)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐsì
** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 si6
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-mi
***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-mi
***Onyomi 1: itsi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eulsa (을사)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Tỵ

==Years of Yin Wood Snake==
Years where the remainder when divided by 60 is 45 are Yin Wood Snake years.

=== Events ===
* The downfall of the Soga clan by {{ill|Prince Naka no Ōe|ja|中大兄皇子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天智天皇|1=Emperor Tenji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q314802}} and [[:en:Nakatomi no Kamatari|Nakatomi no Kamatari]] in {{ill|645|en|645|WD=Q31040|lt=645|1=645}} is known as the {{ill|Isshi incident|en|Isshi incident|WD=Q1062771|lt=Isshi Incident|1=Isshi incident}}.
* The {{ill|Japan–Korea Treaty of 1905|en|Japan–Korea Treaty of 1905|WD=Q233254|lt=Eulsa Treaty|1=Japan–Korea Treaty of 1905}} signed in {{ill|1905|en|1905|WD=Q2047|lt=1905|1=1905}} is referred to as the '''Eulsa''' Protection Treaty in Korea.

==Months of Yin Wood Snake==
April of years ending in 2 or 7 (where the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}) corresponds to the Yin Wood Snake {{ill|Moon|en|Moon|WD=Q405|lt=Month|1=Moon}}. However, in the case of traditional calendars, the Yin Wood Snake month may be applied based on the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lixia|en|Lixia|WD=Q1191007|lt=Lixia|1=Lixia}} to the day before {{ill|Mangzhong|en|Mangzhong|WD=Q1147880|lt=Mangzhong|1=Mangzhong}}).

==Days of Yin Wood Snake==

=== Special Calendar Notations ===
* Yin Wood Snake day is the 13th day of the {{ill|Tianyi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.

'''Yin Wood Snake also known as  Yin Wood Snake''' (乙巳, Kinoto-Mi, Otsuboku-no-Mi, Isshi) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

It is the 42nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, preceded by {{ill|Jiachen|ja|1=Yang Wood Dragon|2=ja|甲辰|1=Yang Wood Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiachen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiachen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Bingwu|ja|1=Yang Fire Horse|2=ja|丙午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingwu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} character {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto ==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Wood Snake (乙巳)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐsì
** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 si6
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-mi
***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-mi
***Onyomi 1: itsi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eulsa (을사)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Tỵ

=== Events ===
* The downfall of the Soga clan by {{ill|Prince Naka no Ōe|ja|中大兄皇子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Naka no Ōe|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天智天皇|1=Emperor Tenji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q314802}} and [[:en:Nakatomi no Kamatari|Nakatomi no Kamatari]] in {{ill|645|en|645|WD=Q31040|lt=645|1=645}} is known as the {{ill|Isshi incident|en|Isshi incident|WD=Q1062771|lt=Isshi Incident|1=Isshi incident}}.
* The {{ill|Japan–Korea Treaty of 1905|en|Japan–Korea Treaty of 1905|WD=Q233254|lt=Eulsa Treaty|1=Japan–Korea Treaty of 1905}} signed in {{ill|1905|en|1905|WD=Q2047|lt=1905|1=1905}} is referred to as the '''Eulsa''' Protection Treaty in Korea.

==Months of Yin Wood Snake==
April of years ending in 2 or 7 (where the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ding|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}) corresponds to the Yin Wood Snake {{ill|Moon|en|Moon|WD=Q405|lt=Month|1=Moon}}. However, in the case of traditional calendars, the Yin Wood Snake month may be applied based on the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lixia|en|Lixia|WD=Q1191007|lt=Lixia|1=Lixia}} to the day before {{ill|Mangzhong|en|Mangzhong|WD=Q1147880|lt=Mangzhong|1=Mangzhong}}).

==Days of Yin Wood Snake==

=== Special Calendar Notations ===
* Yin Wood Snake day is the 13th day of the {{ill|Tianyi Tian Shang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianyi Tian Shang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}} cycle.
